62 { \

66 { \

68 } \

70 { \

72 } \

74 { \
75  return (type_)(static_cast<uint32_t>(lhs) ^ static_cast<uint32_t>(rhs)); \
76 } \

78 { \
79  return lhs = (type_)(static_cast<uint32_t>(lhs) ^ static_cast<uint32_t>(rhs)); \
80 } \
81 inline type_ operator <<(type_ lhs, uint32_t rhs) \
82 { \
83  return (type_)(static_cast<uint32_t>(lhs) << rhs); \
84 } \
85 inline type_& operator <<=(type_& lhs, uint32_t rhs) \
86 { \
87  return lhs = (type_)(static_cast<uint32_t>(lhs) << rhs); \
88 } \
89 inline type_ operator >>(type_ lhs, uint32_t rhs) \
90 { \
91  return (type_)(static_cast<uint32_t>(lhs) >> rhs); \
92 } \
93 inline type_& operator >>=(type_& lhs, uint32_t rhs) \
94 { \
95  return lhs = (type_)(static_cast<uint32_t>(lhs) >> rhs); \
96 } \
97 inline bool operator ==(type_ lhs, uint32_t rhs) \
98 { \
99  return static_cast<uint32_t>(lhs) == rhs; \
100 } \
101 inline bool operator !=(type_ lhs, uint32_t rhs) \
102 { \
103  return static_cast<uint32_t>(lhs) != rhs; \

110 { \

114 { \
115  return (type_)(~static_cast<uint32_t>(lhs)); \
116 }\

118 { \

120 }\

122 { \

127 inline std::string to_string(type_ value) \
128 { \
129  (void)value; \

151 template<typename MyEnum>
152 inline void append_to_string_flag(MyEnum current_value, std::string& current_string, MyEnum flag_to_test, const char* string_to_add)
153 {
154  if(static_cast<uint32_t>(current_value & flag_to_test) != 0)
155  {
156  if (!current_string.empty()){
157  current_string += "|";
158  }
159  current_string += string_to_add;
160  }
161 }

368 // PVRVk Bitmasks
369 enum class CullModeFlags
370 {
371  e_NONE = VK_CULL_MODE_NONE,
372  e_FRONT_BIT = VK_CULL_MODE_FRONT_BIT,
373  e_BACK_BIT = VK_CULL_MODE_BACK_BIT,
374  e_FRONT_AND_BACK = VK_CULL_MODE_FRONT_AND_BACK,
375  e_ALL_BITS = e_FRONT_BIT|e_BACK_BIT|e_FRONT_AND_BACK,
376  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
377 };
378 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(CullModeFlags)
379 inline std::string to_string(CullModeFlags value)
380 {
381  std::string returnString = "";
382  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, CullModeFlags::e_NONE, "VK_CULL_MODE_NONE");
383  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, CullModeFlags::e_FRONT_BIT, "VK_CULL_MODE_FRONT_BIT");
384  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, CullModeFlags::e_BACK_BIT, "VK_CULL_MODE_BACK_BIT");
385  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, CullModeFlags::e_FRONT_AND_BACK, "VK_CULL_MODE_FRONT_AND_BACK");
386  return returnString;
387 }
388 
389 enum class QueueFlags
390 {
391  e_NONE = 0,
392  e_GRAPHICS_BIT = VK_QUEUE_GRAPHICS_BIT,
393  e_COMPUTE_BIT = VK_QUEUE_COMPUTE_BIT,
394  e_TRANSFER_BIT = VK_QUEUE_TRANSFER_BIT,
395  e_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT = VK_QUEUE_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT,
396  e_PROTECTED_BIT = VK_QUEUE_PROTECTED_BIT,
397  e_ALL_BITS = e_GRAPHICS_BIT|e_COMPUTE_BIT|e_TRANSFER_BIT|e_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT|e_PROTECTED_BIT,
398  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
399 };
400 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(QueueFlags)
401 inline std::string to_string(QueueFlags value)
402 {
403  std::string returnString = "";
404  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueueFlags::e_GRAPHICS_BIT, "VK_QUEUE_GRAPHICS_BIT");
405  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueueFlags::e_COMPUTE_BIT, "VK_QUEUE_COMPUTE_BIT");
406  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueueFlags::e_TRANSFER_BIT, "VK_QUEUE_TRANSFER_BIT");
407  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueueFlags::e_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT, "VK_QUEUE_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT");
408  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueueFlags::e_PROTECTED_BIT, "VK_QUEUE_PROTECTED_BIT");
409  return returnString;
410 }

431 enum class MemoryPropertyFlags
432 {
433  e_NONE = 0,
434  e_DEVICE_LOCAL_BIT = VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_DEVICE_LOCAL_BIT,
435  e_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT = VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT,
436  e_HOST_COHERENT_BIT = VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_COHERENT_BIT,
437  e_HOST_CACHED_BIT = VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_CACHED_BIT,
438  e_LAZILY_ALLOCATED_BIT = VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_LAZILY_ALLOCATED_BIT,
439  e_PROTECTED_BIT = VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_PROTECTED_BIT,
440  e_DEVICE_COHERENT_BIT_AMD = VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_DEVICE_COHERENT_BIT_AMD,
441  e_DEVICE_UNCACHED_BIT_AMD = VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_DEVICE_UNCACHED_BIT_AMD,
442  e_ALL_BITS = e_DEVICE_LOCAL_BIT|e_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT|e_HOST_COHERENT_BIT|e_HOST_CACHED_BIT|e_LAZILY_ALLOCATED_BIT|e_PROTECTED_BIT|e_DEVICE_COHERENT_BIT_AMD|e_DEVICE_UNCACHED_BIT_AMD,
443  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
444 };
445 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(MemoryPropertyFlags)
446 inline std::string to_string(MemoryPropertyFlags value)
447 {
448  std::string returnString = "";
449  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, MemoryPropertyFlags::e_DEVICE_LOCAL_BIT, "VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_DEVICE_LOCAL_BIT");
450  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, MemoryPropertyFlags::e_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT, "VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_VISIBLE_BIT");
451  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, MemoryPropertyFlags::e_HOST_COHERENT_BIT, "VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_COHERENT_BIT");
452  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, MemoryPropertyFlags::e_HOST_CACHED_BIT, "VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_HOST_CACHED_BIT");
453  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, MemoryPropertyFlags::e_LAZILY_ALLOCATED_BIT, "VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_LAZILY_ALLOCATED_BIT");
454  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, MemoryPropertyFlags::e_PROTECTED_BIT, "VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_PROTECTED_BIT");
455  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, MemoryPropertyFlags::e_DEVICE_COHERENT_BIT_AMD, "VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_DEVICE_COHERENT_BIT_AMD");
456  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, MemoryPropertyFlags::e_DEVICE_UNCACHED_BIT_AMD, "VK_MEMORY_PROPERTY_DEVICE_UNCACHED_BIT_AMD");
457  return returnString;
458 }
459 
460 enum class MemoryHeapFlags
461 {
462  e_NONE = 0,
463  e_DEVICE_LOCAL_BIT = VK_MEMORY_HEAP_DEVICE_LOCAL_BIT,
464  e_MULTI_INSTANCE_BIT = VK_MEMORY_HEAP_MULTI_INSTANCE_BIT,
465  e_MULTI_INSTANCE_BIT_KHR = VK_MEMORY_HEAP_MULTI_INSTANCE_BIT_KHR,
466  e_ALL_BITS = e_DEVICE_LOCAL_BIT|e_MULTI_INSTANCE_BIT,
467  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
468 };
469 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(MemoryHeapFlags)
470 inline std::string to_string(MemoryHeapFlags value)
471 {
472  std::string returnString = "";

474  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, MemoryHeapFlags::e_MULTI_INSTANCE_BIT, "VK_MEMORY_HEAP_MULTI_INSTANCE_BIT");
475  return returnString;
476 }

478 enum class AccessFlags
479 {
480  e_NONE = 0,
481  e_INDIRECT_COMMAND_READ_BIT = VK_ACCESS_INDIRECT_COMMAND_READ_BIT,
482  e_INDEX_READ_BIT = VK_ACCESS_INDEX_READ_BIT,
483  e_VERTEX_ATTRIBUTE_READ_BIT = VK_ACCESS_VERTEX_ATTRIBUTE_READ_BIT,
484  e_UNIFORM_READ_BIT = VK_ACCESS_UNIFORM_READ_BIT,
485  e_INPUT_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT = VK_ACCESS_INPUT_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT,
486  e_SHADER_READ_BIT = VK_ACCESS_SHADER_READ_BIT,
487  e_SHADER_WRITE_BIT = VK_ACCESS_SHADER_WRITE_BIT,
488  e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT = VK_ACCESS_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT,
489  e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT = VK_ACCESS_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT,
490  e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT = VK_ACCESS_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT,
491  e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT = VK_ACCESS_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT,
492  e_TRANSFER_READ_BIT = VK_ACCESS_TRANSFER_READ_BIT,
493  e_TRANSFER_WRITE_BIT = VK_ACCESS_TRANSFER_WRITE_BIT,
494  e_HOST_READ_BIT = VK_ACCESS_HOST_READ_BIT,
495  e_HOST_WRITE_BIT = VK_ACCESS_HOST_WRITE_BIT,
496  e_MEMORY_READ_BIT = VK_ACCESS_MEMORY_READ_BIT,
497  e_MEMORY_WRITE_BIT = VK_ACCESS_MEMORY_WRITE_BIT,
498  e_COMMAND_PROCESS_READ_BIT_NVX = VK_ACCESS_COMMAND_PROCESS_READ_BIT_NVX,
499  e_COMMAND_PROCESS_WRITE_BIT_NVX = VK_ACCESS_COMMAND_PROCESS_WRITE_BIT_NVX,
500  e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_READ_NONCOHERENT_BIT_EXT = VK_ACCESS_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_READ_NONCOHERENT_BIT_EXT,
501  e_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_READ_BIT_EXT = VK_ACCESS_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_READ_BIT_EXT,
502  e_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_READ_BIT_NV = VK_ACCESS_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_READ_BIT_NV,
503  e_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_WRITE_BIT_NV = VK_ACCESS_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_WRITE_BIT_NV,
504  e_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_READ_BIT_NV = VK_ACCESS_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_READ_BIT_NV,
505  e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_READ_BIT_EXT = VK_ACCESS_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_READ_BIT_EXT,
506  e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_WRITE_BIT_EXT = VK_ACCESS_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_WRITE_BIT_EXT,
507  e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_READ_BIT_EXT = VK_ACCESS_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_READ_BIT_EXT,
508  e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_WRITE_BIT_EXT = VK_ACCESS_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_WRITE_BIT_EXT,
509  e_ALL_BITS = e_INDIRECT_COMMAND_READ_BIT|e_INDEX_READ_BIT|e_VERTEX_ATTRIBUTE_READ_BIT|e_UNIFORM_READ_BIT|e_INPUT_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT|e_SHADER_READ_BIT|e_SHADER_WRITE_BIT|e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT|e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT|e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT|e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT|e_TRANSFER_READ_BIT|e_TRANSFER_WRITE_BIT|e_HOST_READ_BIT|e_HOST_WRITE_BIT|e_MEMORY_READ_BIT|e_MEMORY_WRITE_BIT|e_COMMAND_PROCESS_READ_BIT_NVX|e_COMMAND_PROCESS_WRITE_BIT_NVX|e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_READ_NONCOHERENT_BIT_EXT|e_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_READ_BIT_EXT|e_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_READ_BIT_NV|e_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_WRITE_BIT_NV|e_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_READ_BIT_NV|e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_READ_BIT_EXT|e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_WRITE_BIT_EXT|e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_READ_BIT_EXT|e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_WRITE_BIT_EXT,
510  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
511 };
512 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(AccessFlags)
513 inline std::string to_string(AccessFlags value)
514 {
515  std::string returnString = "";
516  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_INDIRECT_COMMAND_READ_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_INDIRECT_COMMAND_READ_BIT");
517  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_INDEX_READ_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_INDEX_READ_BIT");
518  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_VERTEX_ATTRIBUTE_READ_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_VERTEX_ATTRIBUTE_READ_BIT");
519  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_UNIFORM_READ_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_UNIFORM_READ_BIT");
520  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_INPUT_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_INPUT_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT");
521  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_SHADER_READ_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_SHADER_READ_BIT");
522  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_SHADER_WRITE_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_SHADER_WRITE_BIT");
523  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT");
524  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT");
525  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_READ_BIT");
526  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_WRITE_BIT");
527  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_TRANSFER_READ_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_TRANSFER_READ_BIT");
528  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_TRANSFER_WRITE_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_TRANSFER_WRITE_BIT");
529  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_HOST_READ_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_HOST_READ_BIT");
530  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_HOST_WRITE_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_HOST_WRITE_BIT");
531  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_MEMORY_READ_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_MEMORY_READ_BIT");
532  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_MEMORY_WRITE_BIT, "VK_ACCESS_MEMORY_WRITE_BIT");
533  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_COMMAND_PROCESS_READ_BIT_NVX, "VK_ACCESS_COMMAND_PROCESS_READ_BIT_NVX");
534  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_COMMAND_PROCESS_WRITE_BIT_NVX, "VK_ACCESS_COMMAND_PROCESS_WRITE_BIT_NVX");
535  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_READ_NONCOHERENT_BIT_EXT, "VK_ACCESS_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_READ_NONCOHERENT_BIT_EXT");
536  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_READ_BIT_EXT, "VK_ACCESS_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_READ_BIT_EXT");
537  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_READ_BIT_NV, "VK_ACCESS_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_READ_BIT_NV");
538  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_WRITE_BIT_NV, "VK_ACCESS_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_WRITE_BIT_NV");
539  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_READ_BIT_NV, "VK_ACCESS_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_READ_BIT_NV");
540  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_READ_BIT_EXT, "VK_ACCESS_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_READ_BIT_EXT");
541  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_WRITE_BIT_EXT, "VK_ACCESS_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_WRITE_BIT_EXT");
542  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_READ_BIT_EXT, "VK_ACCESS_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_READ_BIT_EXT");
543  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, AccessFlags::e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_WRITE_BIT_EXT, "VK_ACCESS_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_WRITE_BIT_EXT");
544  return returnString;
545 }
546 
547 enum class BufferUsageFlags
548 {
549  e_NONE = 0,
550  e_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT,
551  e_TRANSFER_DST_BIT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT,
552  e_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT,
553  e_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT,
554  e_UNIFORM_BUFFER_BIT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_UNIFORM_BUFFER_BIT,
555  e_STORAGE_BUFFER_BIT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_STORAGE_BUFFER_BIT,
556  e_INDEX_BUFFER_BIT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_INDEX_BUFFER_BIT,
557  e_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT,
558  e_INDIRECT_BUFFER_BIT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_INDIRECT_BUFFER_BIT,
559  e_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_BIT_EXT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_BIT_EXT,
560  e_RAY_TRACING_BIT_NV = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_RAY_TRACING_BIT_NV,
561  e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_BUFFER_BIT_EXT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_BUFFER_BIT_EXT,
562  e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_BUFFER_BIT_EXT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_BUFFER_BIT_EXT,
563  e_SHADER_DEVICE_ADDRESS_BIT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_SHADER_DEVICE_ADDRESS_BIT,
564  e_SHADER_DEVICE_ADDRESS_BIT_EXT = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_SHADER_DEVICE_ADDRESS_BIT_EXT,
565  e_SHADER_DEVICE_ADDRESS_BIT_KHR = VK_BUFFER_USAGE_SHADER_DEVICE_ADDRESS_BIT_KHR,
566  e_ALL_BITS = e_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT|e_TRANSFER_DST_BIT|e_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT|e_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT|e_UNIFORM_BUFFER_BIT|e_STORAGE_BUFFER_BIT|e_INDEX_BUFFER_BIT|e_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT|e_INDIRECT_BUFFER_BIT|e_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_BIT_EXT|e_RAY_TRACING_BIT_NV|e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_BUFFER_BIT_EXT|e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_BUFFER_BIT_EXT|e_SHADER_DEVICE_ADDRESS_BIT,
567  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
568 };
569 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(BufferUsageFlags)
570 inline std::string to_string(BufferUsageFlags value)
571 {
572  std::string returnString = "";
573  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT");
574  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_TRANSFER_DST_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT");
575  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT");
576  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT");
577  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_UNIFORM_BUFFER_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_UNIFORM_BUFFER_BIT");
578  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_STORAGE_BUFFER_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_STORAGE_BUFFER_BIT");
579  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_INDEX_BUFFER_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_INDEX_BUFFER_BIT");
580  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT");
581  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_INDIRECT_BUFFER_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_INDIRECT_BUFFER_BIT");
582  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_BIT_EXT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_BIT_EXT");
583  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_RAY_TRACING_BIT_NV, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_RAY_TRACING_BIT_NV");
584  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_BUFFER_BIT_EXT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_BUFFER_BIT_EXT");
585  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_BUFFER_BIT_EXT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_COUNTER_BUFFER_BIT_EXT");
586  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferUsageFlags::e_SHADER_DEVICE_ADDRESS_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_USAGE_SHADER_DEVICE_ADDRESS_BIT");
587  return returnString;
588 }
589 
590 enum class BufferCreateFlags
591 {
592  e_NONE = 0,
593  e_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT = VK_BUFFER_CREATE_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT,
594  e_SPARSE_RESIDENCY_BIT = VK_BUFFER_CREATE_SPARSE_RESIDENCY_BIT,
595  e_SPARSE_ALIASED_BIT = VK_BUFFER_CREATE_SPARSE_ALIASED_BIT,
596  e_PROTECTED_BIT = VK_BUFFER_CREATE_PROTECTED_BIT,
597  e_DEVICE_ADDRESS_CAPTURE_REPLAY_BIT = VK_BUFFER_CREATE_DEVICE_ADDRESS_CAPTURE_REPLAY_BIT,
598  e_DEVICE_ADDRESS_CAPTURE_REPLAY_BIT_EXT = VK_BUFFER_CREATE_DEVICE_ADDRESS_CAPTURE_REPLAY_BIT_EXT,
599  e_DEVICE_ADDRESS_CAPTURE_REPLAY_BIT_KHR = VK_BUFFER_CREATE_DEVICE_ADDRESS_CAPTURE_REPLAY_BIT_KHR,
600  e_ALL_BITS = e_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT|e_SPARSE_RESIDENCY_BIT|e_SPARSE_ALIASED_BIT|e_PROTECTED_BIT|e_DEVICE_ADDRESS_CAPTURE_REPLAY_BIT,
601  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
602 };
603 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(BufferCreateFlags)
604 inline std::string to_string(BufferCreateFlags value)
605 {
606  std::string returnString = "";
607  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferCreateFlags::e_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_CREATE_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT");
608  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferCreateFlags::e_SPARSE_RESIDENCY_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_CREATE_SPARSE_RESIDENCY_BIT");
609  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferCreateFlags::e_SPARSE_ALIASED_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_CREATE_SPARSE_ALIASED_BIT");
610  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferCreateFlags::e_PROTECTED_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_CREATE_PROTECTED_BIT");
611  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, BufferCreateFlags::e_DEVICE_ADDRESS_CAPTURE_REPLAY_BIT, "VK_BUFFER_CREATE_DEVICE_ADDRESS_CAPTURE_REPLAY_BIT");
612  return returnString;
613 }

615 enum class ShaderStageFlags
616 {
617  e_NONE = 0,
618  e_VERTEX_BIT = VK_SHADER_STAGE_VERTEX_BIT,
619  e_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_BIT = VK_SHADER_STAGE_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_BIT,
620  e_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_BIT = VK_SHADER_STAGE_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_BIT,
621  e_GEOMETRY_BIT = VK_SHADER_STAGE_GEOMETRY_BIT,
622  e_FRAGMENT_BIT = VK_SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT_BIT,
623  e_ALL_GRAPHICS = VK_SHADER_STAGE_ALL_GRAPHICS,
624  e_COMPUTE_BIT = VK_SHADER_STAGE_COMPUTE_BIT,
625  e_TASK_BIT_NV = VK_SHADER_STAGE_TASK_BIT_NV,
626  e_MESH_BIT_NV = VK_SHADER_STAGE_MESH_BIT_NV,
627  e_RAYGEN_BIT_NV = VK_SHADER_STAGE_RAYGEN_BIT_NV,
628  e_ANY_HIT_BIT_NV = VK_SHADER_STAGE_ANY_HIT_BIT_NV,
629  e_CLOSEST_HIT_BIT_NV = VK_SHADER_STAGE_CLOSEST_HIT_BIT_NV,
630  e_MISS_BIT_NV = VK_SHADER_STAGE_MISS_BIT_NV,
631  e_INTERSECTION_BIT_NV = VK_SHADER_STAGE_INTERSECTION_BIT_NV,
632  e_CALLABLE_BIT_NV = VK_SHADER_STAGE_CALLABLE_BIT_NV,
633  e_ALL = VK_SHADER_STAGE_ALL,
634  e_ALL_BITS = e_VERTEX_BIT|e_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_BIT|e_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_BIT|e_GEOMETRY_BIT|e_FRAGMENT_BIT|e_ALL_GRAPHICS|e_COMPUTE_BIT|e_TASK_BIT_NV|e_MESH_BIT_NV|e_RAYGEN_BIT_NV|e_ANY_HIT_BIT_NV|e_CLOSEST_HIT_BIT_NV|e_MISS_BIT_NV|e_INTERSECTION_BIT_NV|e_CALLABLE_BIT_NV|e_ALL,
635  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
636 };
637 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(ShaderStageFlags)
638 inline std::string to_string(ShaderStageFlags value)
639 {
640  std::string returnString = "";
641  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_VERTEX_BIT, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_VERTEX_BIT");
642  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_BIT, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_BIT");
643  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_BIT, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_BIT");
644  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_GEOMETRY_BIT, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_GEOMETRY_BIT");
645  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_FRAGMENT_BIT, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_FRAGMENT_BIT");
646  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_ALL_GRAPHICS, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_ALL_GRAPHICS");
647  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_COMPUTE_BIT, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_COMPUTE_BIT");
648  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_TASK_BIT_NV, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_TASK_BIT_NV");
649  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_MESH_BIT_NV, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_MESH_BIT_NV");
650  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_RAYGEN_BIT_NV, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_RAYGEN_BIT_NV");
651  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_ANY_HIT_BIT_NV, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_ANY_HIT_BIT_NV");
652  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_CLOSEST_HIT_BIT_NV, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_CLOSEST_HIT_BIT_NV");
653  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_MISS_BIT_NV, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_MISS_BIT_NV");
654  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_INTERSECTION_BIT_NV, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_INTERSECTION_BIT_NV");
655  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_CALLABLE_BIT_NV, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_CALLABLE_BIT_NV");
656  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ShaderStageFlags::e_ALL, "VK_SHADER_STAGE_ALL");
657  return returnString;
658 }

660 enum class ImageUsageFlags
661 {
662  e_NONE = 0,
663  e_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT,
664  e_TRANSFER_DST_BIT = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT,
665  e_SAMPLED_BIT = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_SAMPLED_BIT,
666  e_STORAGE_BIT = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_STORAGE_BIT,
667  e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BIT = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BIT,
668  e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_BIT = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_BIT,
669  e_TRANSIENT_ATTACHMENT_BIT = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_TRANSIENT_ATTACHMENT_BIT,
670  e_INPUT_ATTACHMENT_BIT = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_INPUT_ATTACHMENT_BIT,
671  e_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_BIT_NV = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_BIT_NV,
672  e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_BIT_EXT = VK_IMAGE_USAGE_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_BIT_EXT,
673  e_ALL_BITS = e_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT|e_TRANSFER_DST_BIT|e_SAMPLED_BIT|e_STORAGE_BIT|e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BIT|e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_BIT|e_TRANSIENT_ATTACHMENT_BIT|e_INPUT_ATTACHMENT_BIT|e_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_BIT_NV|e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_BIT_EXT,
674  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
675 };
676 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(ImageUsageFlags)
677 inline std::string to_string(ImageUsageFlags value)
678 {
679  std::string returnString = "";
680  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageUsageFlags::e_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_USAGE_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT");
681  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageUsageFlags::e_TRANSFER_DST_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_USAGE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT");
682  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageUsageFlags::e_SAMPLED_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_USAGE_SAMPLED_BIT");
683  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageUsageFlags::e_STORAGE_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_USAGE_STORAGE_BIT");
684  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageUsageFlags::e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_USAGE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BIT");
685  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageUsageFlags::e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_USAGE_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_BIT");
686  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageUsageFlags::e_TRANSIENT_ATTACHMENT_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_USAGE_TRANSIENT_ATTACHMENT_BIT");
687  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageUsageFlags::e_INPUT_ATTACHMENT_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_USAGE_INPUT_ATTACHMENT_BIT");
688  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageUsageFlags::e_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_BIT_NV, "VK_IMAGE_USAGE_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_BIT_NV");
689  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageUsageFlags::e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_BIT_EXT, "VK_IMAGE_USAGE_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_BIT_EXT");
690  return returnString;
691 }
692 
693 enum class ImageCreateFlags
694 {
695  e_NONE = 0,
696  e_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT,
697  e_SPARSE_RESIDENCY_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SPARSE_RESIDENCY_BIT,
698  e_SPARSE_ALIASED_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SPARSE_ALIASED_BIT,
699  e_MUTABLE_FORMAT_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_MUTABLE_FORMAT_BIT,
700  e_CUBE_COMPATIBLE_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_CUBE_COMPATIBLE_BIT,
701  e_2D_ARRAY_COMPATIBLE_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_2D_ARRAY_COMPATIBLE_BIT,
702  e_SPLIT_INSTANCE_BIND_REGIONS_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SPLIT_INSTANCE_BIND_REGIONS_BIT,
703  e_BLOCK_TEXEL_VIEW_COMPATIBLE_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_BLOCK_TEXEL_VIEW_COMPATIBLE_BIT,
704  e_EXTENDED_USAGE_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_EXTENDED_USAGE_BIT,
705  e_DISJOINT_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_DISJOINT_BIT,
706  e_ALIAS_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_ALIAS_BIT,
707  e_PROTECTED_BIT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_PROTECTED_BIT,
708  e_SAMPLE_LOCATIONS_COMPATIBLE_DEPTH_BIT_EXT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SAMPLE_LOCATIONS_COMPATIBLE_DEPTH_BIT_EXT,
709  e_CORNER_SAMPLED_BIT_NV = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_CORNER_SAMPLED_BIT_NV,
710  e_SUBSAMPLED_BIT_EXT = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SUBSAMPLED_BIT_EXT,
711  e_SPLIT_INSTANCE_BIND_REGIONS_BIT_KHR = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SPLIT_INSTANCE_BIND_REGIONS_BIT_KHR,
712  e_2D_ARRAY_COMPATIBLE_BIT_KHR = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_2D_ARRAY_COMPATIBLE_BIT_KHR,
713  e_BLOCK_TEXEL_VIEW_COMPATIBLE_BIT_KHR = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_BLOCK_TEXEL_VIEW_COMPATIBLE_BIT_KHR,
714  e_EXTENDED_USAGE_BIT_KHR = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_EXTENDED_USAGE_BIT_KHR,
715  e_DISJOINT_BIT_KHR = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_DISJOINT_BIT_KHR,
716  e_ALIAS_BIT_KHR = VK_IMAGE_CREATE_ALIAS_BIT_KHR,
717  e_ALL_BITS = e_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT|e_SPARSE_RESIDENCY_BIT|e_SPARSE_ALIASED_BIT|e_MUTABLE_FORMAT_BIT|e_CUBE_COMPATIBLE_BIT|e_2D_ARRAY_COMPATIBLE_BIT|e_SPLIT_INSTANCE_BIND_REGIONS_BIT|e_BLOCK_TEXEL_VIEW_COMPATIBLE_BIT|e_EXTENDED_USAGE_BIT|e_DISJOINT_BIT|e_ALIAS_BIT|e_PROTECTED_BIT|e_SAMPLE_LOCATIONS_COMPATIBLE_DEPTH_BIT_EXT|e_CORNER_SAMPLED_BIT_NV|e_SUBSAMPLED_BIT_EXT,
718  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
719 };
720 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(ImageCreateFlags)
721 inline std::string to_string(ImageCreateFlags value)
722 {
723  std::string returnString = "";
724  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SPARSE_BINDING_BIT");
725  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_SPARSE_RESIDENCY_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SPARSE_RESIDENCY_BIT");
726  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_SPARSE_ALIASED_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SPARSE_ALIASED_BIT");
727  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_MUTABLE_FORMAT_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_MUTABLE_FORMAT_BIT");
728  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_CUBE_COMPATIBLE_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_CUBE_COMPATIBLE_BIT");
729  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_2D_ARRAY_COMPATIBLE_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_2D_ARRAY_COMPATIBLE_BIT");
730  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_SPLIT_INSTANCE_BIND_REGIONS_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SPLIT_INSTANCE_BIND_REGIONS_BIT");
731  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_BLOCK_TEXEL_VIEW_COMPATIBLE_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_BLOCK_TEXEL_VIEW_COMPATIBLE_BIT");
732  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_EXTENDED_USAGE_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_EXTENDED_USAGE_BIT");
733  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_DISJOINT_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_DISJOINT_BIT");
734  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_ALIAS_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_ALIAS_BIT");
735  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_PROTECTED_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_PROTECTED_BIT");
736  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_SAMPLE_LOCATIONS_COMPATIBLE_DEPTH_BIT_EXT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SAMPLE_LOCATIONS_COMPATIBLE_DEPTH_BIT_EXT");
737  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_CORNER_SAMPLED_BIT_NV, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_CORNER_SAMPLED_BIT_NV");
738  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageCreateFlags::e_SUBSAMPLED_BIT_EXT, "VK_IMAGE_CREATE_SUBSAMPLED_BIT_EXT");
739  return returnString;
740 }

782  e_DEFER_COMPILE_BIT_NV = VK_PIPELINE_CREATE_DEFER_COMPILE_BIT_NV,

863 enum class FormatFeatureFlags
864 {
865  e_NONE = 0,
866  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_BIT,
867  e_STORAGE_IMAGE_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_STORAGE_IMAGE_BIT,
868  e_STORAGE_IMAGE_ATOMIC_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_STORAGE_IMAGE_ATOMIC_BIT,
869  e_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT,
870  e_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT,
871  e_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_ATOMIC_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_ATOMIC_BIT,
872  e_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT,
873  e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BIT,
874  e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BLEND_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BLEND_BIT,
875  e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_BIT,
876  e_BLIT_SRC_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_BLIT_SRC_BIT,
877  e_BLIT_DST_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_BLIT_DST_BIT,
878  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_LINEAR_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_LINEAR_BIT,
879  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_CUBIC_BIT_IMG = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_CUBIC_BIT_IMG,
880  e_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT,
881  e_TRANSFER_DST_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT,
882  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_MINMAX_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_MINMAX_BIT,
883  e_MIDPOINT_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_MIDPOINT_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT,
884  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_LINEAR_FILTER_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_LINEAR_FILTER_BIT,
885  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_SEPARATE_RECONSTRUCTION_FILTER_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_SEPARATE_RECONSTRUCTION_FILTER_BIT,
886  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_BIT,
887  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_FORCEABLE_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_FORCEABLE_BIT,
888  e_DISJOINT_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_DISJOINT_BIT,
889  e_COSITED_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_COSITED_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT,
890  e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_BIT_EXT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_BIT_EXT,
891  e_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT_KHR = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT_KHR,
892  e_TRANSFER_DST_BIT_KHR = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT_KHR,
893  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_MINMAX_BIT_EXT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_MINMAX_BIT_EXT,
894  e_MIDPOINT_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT_KHR = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_MIDPOINT_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT_KHR,
895  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_LINEAR_FILTER_BIT_KHR = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_LINEAR_FILTER_BIT_KHR,
896  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_SEPARATE_RECONSTRUCTION_FILTER_BIT_KHR = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_SEPARATE_RECONSTRUCTION_FILTER_BIT_KHR,
897  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_BIT_KHR = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_BIT_KHR,
898  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_FORCEABLE_BIT_KHR = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_FORCEABLE_BIT_KHR,
899  e_DISJOINT_BIT_KHR = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_DISJOINT_BIT_KHR,
900  e_COSITED_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT_KHR = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_COSITED_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT_KHR,
901  e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_CUBIC_BIT_EXT = VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_CUBIC_BIT_EXT,
902  e_ALL_BITS = e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_BIT|e_STORAGE_IMAGE_BIT|e_STORAGE_IMAGE_ATOMIC_BIT|e_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT|e_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT|e_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_ATOMIC_BIT|e_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT|e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BIT|e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BLEND_BIT|e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_BIT|e_BLIT_SRC_BIT|e_BLIT_DST_BIT|e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_LINEAR_BIT|e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_CUBIC_BIT_IMG|e_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT|e_TRANSFER_DST_BIT|e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_MINMAX_BIT|e_MIDPOINT_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT|e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_LINEAR_FILTER_BIT|e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_SEPARATE_RECONSTRUCTION_FILTER_BIT|e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_BIT|e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_FORCEABLE_BIT|e_DISJOINT_BIT|e_COSITED_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT|e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_BIT_EXT,
903  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
904 };
905 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(FormatFeatureFlags)
906 inline std::string to_string(FormatFeatureFlags value)
907 {
908  std::string returnString = "";
909  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_BIT");
910  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_STORAGE_IMAGE_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_STORAGE_IMAGE_BIT");
911  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_STORAGE_IMAGE_ATOMIC_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_STORAGE_IMAGE_ATOMIC_BIT");
912  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_UNIFORM_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT");
913  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_BIT");
914  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_ATOMIC_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_STORAGE_TEXEL_BUFFER_ATOMIC_BIT");
915  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_VERTEX_BUFFER_BIT");
916  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BIT");
917  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BLEND_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_BLEND_BIT");
918  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_BIT");
919  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_BLIT_SRC_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_BLIT_SRC_BIT");
920  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_BLIT_DST_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_BLIT_DST_BIT");
921  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_LINEAR_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_LINEAR_BIT");
922  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_CUBIC_BIT_IMG, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_CUBIC_BIT_IMG");
923  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_TRANSFER_SRC_BIT");
924  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_TRANSFER_DST_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_TRANSFER_DST_BIT");
925  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_MINMAX_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_FILTER_MINMAX_BIT");
926  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_MIDPOINT_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_MIDPOINT_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT");
927  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_LINEAR_FILTER_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_LINEAR_FILTER_BIT");
928  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_SEPARATE_RECONSTRUCTION_FILTER_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_SEPARATE_RECONSTRUCTION_FILTER_BIT");
929  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_BIT");
930  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_FORCEABLE_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_SAMPLED_IMAGE_YCBCR_CONVERSION_CHROMA_RECONSTRUCTION_EXPLICIT_FORCEABLE_BIT");
931  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_DISJOINT_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_DISJOINT_BIT");
932  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_COSITED_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_COSITED_CHROMA_SAMPLES_BIT");
933  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, FormatFeatureFlags::e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_BIT_EXT, "VK_FORMAT_FEATURE_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_BIT_EXT");
934  return returnString;
935 }

953 {
954  e_NONE = 0,
955  e_64_BIT = VK_QUERY_RESULT_64_BIT,
956  e_WAIT_BIT = VK_QUERY_RESULT_WAIT_BIT,
957  e_WITH_AVAILABILITY_BIT = VK_QUERY_RESULT_WITH_AVAILABILITY_BIT,
958  e_PARTIAL_BIT = VK_QUERY_RESULT_PARTIAL_BIT,
959  e_ALL_BITS = e_64_BIT|e_WAIT_BIT|e_WITH_AVAILABILITY_BIT|e_PARTIAL_BIT,
960  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
961 };
962 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(QueryResultFlags)
963 inline std::string to_string(QueryResultFlags value)
964 {
965  std::string returnString = "";
966  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryResultFlags::e_64_BIT, "VK_QUERY_RESULT_64_BIT");
967  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryResultFlags::e_WAIT_BIT, "VK_QUERY_RESULT_WAIT_BIT");
968  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryResultFlags::e_WITH_AVAILABILITY_BIT, "VK_QUERY_RESULT_WITH_AVAILABILITY_BIT");
969  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryResultFlags::e_PARTIAL_BIT, "VK_QUERY_RESULT_PARTIAL_BIT");
970  return returnString;
971 }

992 enum class QueryPipelineStatisticFlags
993 {
994  e_NONE = 0,
995  e_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_VERTICES_BIT = VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_VERTICES_BIT,
996  e_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_PRIMITIVES_BIT = VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_PRIMITIVES_BIT,
997  e_VERTEX_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT = VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_VERTEX_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT,
998  e_GEOMETRY_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT = VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_GEOMETRY_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT,
999  e_GEOMETRY_SHADER_PRIMITIVES_BIT = VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_GEOMETRY_SHADER_PRIMITIVES_BIT,
1000  e_CLIPPING_INVOCATIONS_BIT = VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_CLIPPING_INVOCATIONS_BIT,
1001  e_CLIPPING_PRIMITIVES_BIT = VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_CLIPPING_PRIMITIVES_BIT,
1002  e_FRAGMENT_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT = VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_FRAGMENT_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT,
1003  e_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_SHADER_PATCHES_BIT = VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_SHADER_PATCHES_BIT,
1004  e_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT = VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT,
1005  e_COMPUTE_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT = VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_COMPUTE_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT,
1006  e_ALL_BITS = e_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_VERTICES_BIT|e_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_PRIMITIVES_BIT|e_VERTEX_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT|e_GEOMETRY_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT|e_GEOMETRY_SHADER_PRIMITIVES_BIT|e_CLIPPING_INVOCATIONS_BIT|e_CLIPPING_PRIMITIVES_BIT|e_FRAGMENT_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT|e_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_SHADER_PATCHES_BIT|e_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT|e_COMPUTE_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT,
1007  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
1008 };
1009 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(QueryPipelineStatisticFlags)
1010 inline std::string to_string(QueryPipelineStatisticFlags value)
1011 {
1012  std::string returnString = "";
1013  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryPipelineStatisticFlags::e_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_VERTICES_BIT, "VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_VERTICES_BIT");
1014  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryPipelineStatisticFlags::e_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_PRIMITIVES_BIT, "VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_INPUT_ASSEMBLY_PRIMITIVES_BIT");
1015  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryPipelineStatisticFlags::e_VERTEX_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT, "VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_VERTEX_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT");
1016  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryPipelineStatisticFlags::e_GEOMETRY_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT, "VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_GEOMETRY_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT");
1017  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryPipelineStatisticFlags::e_GEOMETRY_SHADER_PRIMITIVES_BIT, "VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_GEOMETRY_SHADER_PRIMITIVES_BIT");
1018  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryPipelineStatisticFlags::e_CLIPPING_INVOCATIONS_BIT, "VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_CLIPPING_INVOCATIONS_BIT");
1019  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryPipelineStatisticFlags::e_CLIPPING_PRIMITIVES_BIT, "VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_CLIPPING_PRIMITIVES_BIT");
1020  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryPipelineStatisticFlags::e_FRAGMENT_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT, "VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_FRAGMENT_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT");
1021  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryPipelineStatisticFlags::e_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_SHADER_PATCHES_BIT, "VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_SHADER_PATCHES_BIT");
1022  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryPipelineStatisticFlags::e_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT, "VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT");
1023  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, QueryPipelineStatisticFlags::e_COMPUTE_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT, "VK_QUERY_PIPELINE_STATISTIC_COMPUTE_SHADER_INVOCATIONS_BIT");
1024  return returnString;
1025 }

1027 enum class ImageAspectFlags
1028 {

1031  e_DEPTH_BIT = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_DEPTH_BIT,
1032  e_STENCIL_BIT = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_STENCIL_BIT,
1033  e_METADATA_BIT = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_METADATA_BIT,
1034  e_PLANE_0_BIT = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_PLANE_0_BIT,
1035  e_PLANE_1_BIT = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_PLANE_1_BIT,
1036  e_PLANE_2_BIT = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_PLANE_2_BIT,
1037  e_MEMORY_PLANE_0_BIT_EXT = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_MEMORY_PLANE_0_BIT_EXT,
1038  e_MEMORY_PLANE_1_BIT_EXT = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_MEMORY_PLANE_1_BIT_EXT,
1039  e_MEMORY_PLANE_2_BIT_EXT = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_MEMORY_PLANE_2_BIT_EXT,
1040  e_MEMORY_PLANE_3_BIT_EXT = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_MEMORY_PLANE_3_BIT_EXT,
1041  e_PLANE_0_BIT_KHR = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_PLANE_0_BIT_KHR,
1042  e_PLANE_1_BIT_KHR = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_PLANE_1_BIT_KHR,
1043  e_PLANE_2_BIT_KHR = VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_PLANE_2_BIT_KHR,
1044  e_ALL_BITS = e_COLOR_BIT|e_DEPTH_BIT|e_STENCIL_BIT|e_METADATA_BIT|e_PLANE_0_BIT|e_PLANE_1_BIT|e_PLANE_2_BIT|e_MEMORY_PLANE_0_BIT_EXT|e_MEMORY_PLANE_1_BIT_EXT|e_MEMORY_PLANE_2_BIT_EXT|e_MEMORY_PLANE_3_BIT_EXT,
1045  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
1046 };
1047 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(ImageAspectFlags)
1048 inline std::string to_string(ImageAspectFlags value)
1049 {

1051  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageAspectFlags::e_COLOR_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_COLOR_BIT");
1052  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageAspectFlags::e_DEPTH_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_DEPTH_BIT");
1053  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageAspectFlags::e_STENCIL_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_STENCIL_BIT");
1054  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageAspectFlags::e_METADATA_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_METADATA_BIT");
1055  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageAspectFlags::e_PLANE_0_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_PLANE_0_BIT");
1056  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageAspectFlags::e_PLANE_1_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_PLANE_1_BIT");
1057  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageAspectFlags::e_PLANE_2_BIT, "VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_PLANE_2_BIT");
1058  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageAspectFlags::e_MEMORY_PLANE_0_BIT_EXT, "VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_MEMORY_PLANE_0_BIT_EXT");
1059  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageAspectFlags::e_MEMORY_PLANE_1_BIT_EXT, "VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_MEMORY_PLANE_1_BIT_EXT");
1060  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageAspectFlags::e_MEMORY_PLANE_2_BIT_EXT, "VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_MEMORY_PLANE_2_BIT_EXT");
1061  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ImageAspectFlags::e_MEMORY_PLANE_3_BIT_EXT, "VK_IMAGE_ASPECT_MEMORY_PLANE_3_BIT_EXT");
1062  return returnString;
1063 }

1099 enum class PipelineStageFlags
1100 {
1101  e_NONE = 0,
1102  e_TOP_OF_PIPE_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TOP_OF_PIPE_BIT,
1103  e_DRAW_INDIRECT_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_DRAW_INDIRECT_BIT,

1105  e_VERTEX_SHADER_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_VERTEX_SHADER_BIT,
1106  e_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_SHADER_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_SHADER_BIT,

1108  e_GEOMETRY_SHADER_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_GEOMETRY_SHADER_BIT,
1109  e_FRAGMENT_SHADER_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_FRAGMENT_SHADER_BIT,
1110  e_EARLY_FRAGMENT_TESTS_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_EARLY_FRAGMENT_TESTS_BIT,
1111  e_LATE_FRAGMENT_TESTS_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_LATE_FRAGMENT_TESTS_BIT,
1112  e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_OUTPUT_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_OUTPUT_BIT,
1113  e_COMPUTE_SHADER_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_COMPUTE_SHADER_BIT,
1114  e_TRANSFER_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TRANSFER_BIT,
1115  e_BOTTOM_OF_PIPE_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_BOTTOM_OF_PIPE_BIT,
1116  e_HOST_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_HOST_BIT,
1117  e_ALL_GRAPHICS_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_ALL_GRAPHICS_BIT,
1118  e_ALL_COMMANDS_BIT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_ALL_COMMANDS_BIT,
1119  e_COMMAND_PROCESS_BIT_NVX = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_COMMAND_PROCESS_BIT_NVX,
1120  e_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_BIT_EXT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_BIT_EXT,
1121  e_TASK_SHADER_BIT_NV = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TASK_SHADER_BIT_NV,
1122  e_MESH_SHADER_BIT_NV = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_MESH_SHADER_BIT_NV,
1123  e_RAY_TRACING_SHADER_BIT_NV = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_RAY_TRACING_SHADER_BIT_NV,
1124  e_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_BIT_NV = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_BIT_NV,
1125  e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_PROCESS_BIT_EXT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_PROCESS_BIT_EXT,
1126  e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_BIT_EXT = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_BIT_EXT,
1127  e_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_BIT_NV = VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_BIT_NV,
1128  e_ALL_BITS = e_TOP_OF_PIPE_BIT|e_DRAW_INDIRECT_BIT|e_VERTEX_INPUT_BIT|e_VERTEX_SHADER_BIT|e_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_SHADER_BIT|e_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_SHADER_BIT|e_GEOMETRY_SHADER_BIT|e_FRAGMENT_SHADER_BIT|e_EARLY_FRAGMENT_TESTS_BIT|e_LATE_FRAGMENT_TESTS_BIT|e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_OUTPUT_BIT|e_COMPUTE_SHADER_BIT|e_TRANSFER_BIT|e_BOTTOM_OF_PIPE_BIT|e_HOST_BIT|e_ALL_GRAPHICS_BIT|e_ALL_COMMANDS_BIT|e_COMMAND_PROCESS_BIT_NVX|e_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_BIT_EXT|e_TASK_SHADER_BIT_NV|e_MESH_SHADER_BIT_NV|e_RAY_TRACING_SHADER_BIT_NV|e_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_BIT_NV|e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_PROCESS_BIT_EXT|e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_BIT_EXT|e_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_BIT_NV,
1129  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
1130 };
1131 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(PipelineStageFlags)
1132 inline std::string to_string(PipelineStageFlags value)
1133 {
1134  std::string returnString = "";
1135  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_TOP_OF_PIPE_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TOP_OF_PIPE_BIT");
1136  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_DRAW_INDIRECT_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_DRAW_INDIRECT_BIT");
1137  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_VERTEX_INPUT_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_VERTEX_INPUT_BIT");
1138  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_VERTEX_SHADER_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_VERTEX_SHADER_BIT");
1139  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_SHADER_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TESSELLATION_CONTROL_SHADER_BIT");
1140  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_SHADER_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TESSELLATION_EVALUATION_SHADER_BIT");
1141  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_GEOMETRY_SHADER_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_GEOMETRY_SHADER_BIT");
1142  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_FRAGMENT_SHADER_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_FRAGMENT_SHADER_BIT");
1143  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_EARLY_FRAGMENT_TESTS_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_EARLY_FRAGMENT_TESTS_BIT");
1144  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_LATE_FRAGMENT_TESTS_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_LATE_FRAGMENT_TESTS_BIT");
1145  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_OUTPUT_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_OUTPUT_BIT");
1146  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_COMPUTE_SHADER_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_COMPUTE_SHADER_BIT");
1147  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_TRANSFER_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TRANSFER_BIT");
1148  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_BOTTOM_OF_PIPE_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_BOTTOM_OF_PIPE_BIT");
1149  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_HOST_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_HOST_BIT");
1150  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_ALL_GRAPHICS_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_ALL_GRAPHICS_BIT");
1151  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_ALL_COMMANDS_BIT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_ALL_COMMANDS_BIT");
1152  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_COMMAND_PROCESS_BIT_NVX, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_COMMAND_PROCESS_BIT_NVX");
1153  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_BIT_EXT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_CONDITIONAL_RENDERING_BIT_EXT");
1154  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_TASK_SHADER_BIT_NV, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TASK_SHADER_BIT_NV");
1155  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_MESH_SHADER_BIT_NV, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_MESH_SHADER_BIT_NV");
1156  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_RAY_TRACING_SHADER_BIT_NV, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_RAY_TRACING_SHADER_BIT_NV");
1157  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_BIT_NV, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_SHADING_RATE_IMAGE_BIT_NV");
1158  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_PROCESS_BIT_EXT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_PROCESS_BIT_EXT");
1159  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_BIT_EXT, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_TRANSFORM_FEEDBACK_BIT_EXT");
1160  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, PipelineStageFlags::e_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_BIT_NV, "VK_PIPELINE_STAGE_ACCELERATION_STRUCTURE_BUILD_BIT_NV");
1161  return returnString;

1588  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ExternalMemoryHandleTypeFlags::e_HOST_MAPPED_FOREIGN_MEMORY_BIT_EXT, "VK_EXTERNAL_MEMORY_HANDLE_TYPE_HOST_MAPPED_FOREIGN_MEMORY_BIT_EXT");

1590  append_to_string_flag(value, returnString, ExternalMemoryHandleTypeFlags::e_ANDROID_HARDWARE_BUFFER_BIT_ANDROID, "VK_EXTERNAL_MEMORY_HANDLE_TYPE_ANDROID_HARDWARE_BUFFER_BIT_ANDROID");

2130  e_SHADER_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_SHADER_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL,
2131  e_TRANSFER_SRC_OPTIMAL = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_TRANSFER_SRC_OPTIMAL,
2132  e_TRANSFER_DST_OPTIMAL = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_TRANSFER_DST_OPTIMAL,
2133  e_PREINITIALIZED = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_PREINITIALIZED,
2134  e_PRESENT_SRC_KHR = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_PRESENT_SRC_KHR,
2135  e_SHARED_PRESENT_KHR = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_SHARED_PRESENT_KHR,

2138  e_SHADING_RATE_OPTIMAL_NV = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_SHADING_RATE_OPTIMAL_NV,
2139  e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_OPTIMAL_EXT = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_OPTIMAL_EXT,
2140  e_DEPTH_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL,
2141  e_DEPTH_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL,
2142  e_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL,
2143  e_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL,
2144  e_DEPTH_READ_ONLY_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL_KHR = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_READ_ONLY_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL_KHR,
2145  e_DEPTH_ATTACHMENT_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL_KHR = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_ATTACHMENT_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL_KHR,
2146  e_DEPTH_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL_KHR = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL_KHR,
2147  e_DEPTH_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL_KHR = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL_KHR,
2148  e_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL_KHR = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL_KHR,
2149  e_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL_KHR = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL_KHR,
2150  e_BEGIN_RANGE = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_BEGIN_RANGE,
2151  e_END_RANGE = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_END_RANGE,
2152  e_RANGE_SIZE = VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_RANGE_SIZE,
2153  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
2154 };
2155 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(ImageLayout)
2156 inline std::string to_string(ImageLayout value)
2157 {
2158  switch(value)
2159  {
2160  case ImageLayout::e_UNDEFINED: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_UNDEFINED";
2161  case ImageLayout::e_GENERAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_GENERAL";
2162  case ImageLayout::e_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_COLOR_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL";
2163  case ImageLayout::e_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL";
2164  case ImageLayout::e_DEPTH_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL";
2165  case ImageLayout::e_SHADER_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_SHADER_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL";
2166  case ImageLayout::e_TRANSFER_SRC_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_TRANSFER_SRC_OPTIMAL";
2167  case ImageLayout::e_TRANSFER_DST_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_TRANSFER_DST_OPTIMAL";
2168  case ImageLayout::e_PREINITIALIZED: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_PREINITIALIZED";
2169  case ImageLayout::e_PRESENT_SRC_KHR: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_PRESENT_SRC_KHR";
2170  case ImageLayout::e_SHARED_PRESENT_KHR: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_SHARED_PRESENT_KHR";
2171  case ImageLayout::e_DEPTH_READ_ONLY_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_READ_ONLY_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL";
2172  case ImageLayout::e_DEPTH_ATTACHMENT_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_ATTACHMENT_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL";
2173  case ImageLayout::e_SHADING_RATE_OPTIMAL_NV: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_SHADING_RATE_OPTIMAL_NV";
2174  case ImageLayout::e_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_OPTIMAL_EXT: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_FRAGMENT_DENSITY_MAP_OPTIMAL_EXT";
2175  case ImageLayout::e_DEPTH_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL";
2176  case ImageLayout::e_DEPTH_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_DEPTH_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL";
2177  case ImageLayout::e_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_STENCIL_ATTACHMENT_OPTIMAL";
2178  case ImageLayout::e_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL: return "VK_IMAGE_LAYOUT_STENCIL_READ_ONLY_OPTIMAL";
2179  default: return "invalid";
2180  }
2181 }
2182

2493  e_LINE_STRIP = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_LINE_STRIP,
2494  e_TRIANGLE_LIST = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_LIST,
2495  e_TRIANGLE_STRIP = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_STRIP,
2496  e_TRIANGLE_FAN = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_FAN,
2497  e_LINE_LIST_WITH_ADJACENCY = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_LINE_LIST_WITH_ADJACENCY,
2498  e_LINE_STRIP_WITH_ADJACENCY = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_LINE_STRIP_WITH_ADJACENCY,
2499  e_TRIANGLE_LIST_WITH_ADJACENCY = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_LIST_WITH_ADJACENCY,
2500  e_TRIANGLE_STRIP_WITH_ADJACENCY = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_STRIP_WITH_ADJACENCY,
2501  e_PATCH_LIST = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_PATCH_LIST,
2502  e_BEGIN_RANGE = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_BEGIN_RANGE,
2503  e_END_RANGE = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_END_RANGE,
2504  e_RANGE_SIZE = VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_RANGE_SIZE,
2505  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
2506 };
2507 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(PrimitiveTopology)
2508 inline std::string to_string(PrimitiveTopology value)
2509 {
2510  switch(value)
2511  {
2512  case PrimitiveTopology::e_POINT_LIST: return "VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_POINT_LIST";
2513  case PrimitiveTopology::e_LINE_LIST: return "VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_LINE_LIST";
2514  case PrimitiveTopology::e_LINE_STRIP: return "VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_LINE_STRIP";
2515  case PrimitiveTopology::e_TRIANGLE_LIST: return "VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_LIST";
2516  case PrimitiveTopology::e_TRIANGLE_STRIP: return "VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_STRIP";
2517  case PrimitiveTopology::e_TRIANGLE_FAN: return "VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_FAN";
2518  case PrimitiveTopology::e_LINE_LIST_WITH_ADJACENCY: return "VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_LINE_LIST_WITH_ADJACENCY";
2519  case PrimitiveTopology::e_LINE_STRIP_WITH_ADJACENCY: return "VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_LINE_STRIP_WITH_ADJACENCY";
2520  case PrimitiveTopology::e_TRIANGLE_LIST_WITH_ADJACENCY: return "VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_LIST_WITH_ADJACENCY";
2521  case PrimitiveTopology::e_TRIANGLE_STRIP_WITH_ADJACENCY: return "VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_TRIANGLE_STRIP_WITH_ADJACENCY";
2522  case PrimitiveTopology::e_PATCH_LIST: return "VK_PRIMITIVE_TOPOLOGY_PATCH_LIST";
2523  default: return "invalid";
2524  }
2525 }

2777  e_MAX = VK_BLEND_OP_MAX,
2778  e_ZERO_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_ZERO_EXT,
2779  e_SRC_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_SRC_EXT,
2780  e_DST_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_DST_EXT,
2781  e_SRC_OVER_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_SRC_OVER_EXT,
2782  e_DST_OVER_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_DST_OVER_EXT,
2783  e_SRC_IN_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_SRC_IN_EXT,
2784  e_DST_IN_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_DST_IN_EXT,

2786  e_DST_OUT_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_DST_OUT_EXT,

2788  e_DST_ATOP_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_DST_ATOP_EXT,
2789  e_XOR_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_XOR_EXT,
2790  e_MULTIPLY_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_MULTIPLY_EXT,
2791  e_SCREEN_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_SCREEN_EXT,
2792  e_OVERLAY_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_OVERLAY_EXT,
2793  e_DARKEN_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_DARKEN_EXT,
2794  e_LIGHTEN_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_LIGHTEN_EXT,
2795  e_COLORDODGE_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_COLORDODGE_EXT,
2796  e_COLORBURN_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_COLORBURN_EXT,
2797  e_HARDLIGHT_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_HARDLIGHT_EXT,
2798  e_SOFTLIGHT_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_SOFTLIGHT_EXT,
2799  e_DIFFERENCE_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_DIFFERENCE_EXT,
2800  e_EXCLUSION_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_EXCLUSION_EXT,
2801  e_INVERT_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_INVERT_EXT,
2802  e_INVERT_RGB_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_INVERT_RGB_EXT,

2804  e_LINEARBURN_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_LINEARBURN_EXT,
2805  e_VIVIDLIGHT_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_VIVIDLIGHT_EXT,
2806  e_LINEARLIGHT_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_LINEARLIGHT_EXT,
2807  e_PINLIGHT_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_PINLIGHT_EXT,
2808  e_HARDMIX_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_HARDMIX_EXT,
2809  e_HSL_HUE_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_HSL_HUE_EXT,
2810  e_HSL_SATURATION_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_HSL_SATURATION_EXT,
2811  e_HSL_COLOR_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_HSL_COLOR_EXT,
2812  e_HSL_LUMINOSITY_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_HSL_LUMINOSITY_EXT,
2813  e_PLUS_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_PLUS_EXT,
2814  e_PLUS_CLAMPED_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_PLUS_CLAMPED_EXT,
2815  e_PLUS_CLAMPED_ALPHA_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_PLUS_CLAMPED_ALPHA_EXT,
2816  e_PLUS_DARKER_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_PLUS_DARKER_EXT,
2817  e_MINUS_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_MINUS_EXT,
2818  e_MINUS_CLAMPED_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_MINUS_CLAMPED_EXT,

2821  e_RED_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_RED_EXT,
2822  e_GREEN_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_GREEN_EXT,
2823  e_BLUE_EXT = VK_BLEND_OP_BLUE_EXT,
2824  e_BEGIN_RANGE = VK_BLEND_OP_BEGIN_RANGE,
2825  e_END_RANGE = VK_BLEND_OP_END_RANGE,
2826  e_RANGE_SIZE = VK_BLEND_OP_RANGE_SIZE,
2827  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
2828 };
2829 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(BlendOp)
2830 inline std::string to_string(BlendOp value)
2831 {
2832  switch(value)
2833  {
2834  case BlendOp::e_ADD: return "VK_BLEND_OP_ADD";
2835  case BlendOp::e_SUBTRACT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_SUBTRACT";
2836  case BlendOp::e_REVERSE_SUBTRACT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_REVERSE_SUBTRACT";
2837  case BlendOp::e_MIN: return "VK_BLEND_OP_MIN";
2838  case BlendOp::e_MAX: return "VK_BLEND_OP_MAX";
2839  case BlendOp::e_ZERO_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_ZERO_EXT";
2840  case BlendOp::e_SRC_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_SRC_EXT";
2841  case BlendOp::e_DST_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_DST_EXT";
2842  case BlendOp::e_SRC_OVER_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_SRC_OVER_EXT";
2843  case BlendOp::e_DST_OVER_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_DST_OVER_EXT";
2844  case BlendOp::e_SRC_IN_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_SRC_IN_EXT";
2845  case BlendOp::e_DST_IN_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_DST_IN_EXT";
2846  case BlendOp::e_SRC_OUT_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_SRC_OUT_EXT";
2847  case BlendOp::e_DST_OUT_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_DST_OUT_EXT";
2848  case BlendOp::e_SRC_ATOP_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_SRC_ATOP_EXT";
2849  case BlendOp::e_DST_ATOP_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_DST_ATOP_EXT";
2850  case BlendOp::e_XOR_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_XOR_EXT";
2851  case BlendOp::e_MULTIPLY_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_MULTIPLY_EXT";

2859  case BlendOp::e_SOFTLIGHT_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_SOFTLIGHT_EXT";

2873  case BlendOp::e_HSL_LUMINOSITY_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_HSL_LUMINOSITY_EXT";

2875  case BlendOp::e_PLUS_CLAMPED_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_PLUS_CLAMPED_EXT";

2877  case BlendOp::e_PLUS_DARKER_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_PLUS_DARKER_EXT";
2878  case BlendOp::e_MINUS_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_MINUS_EXT";
2879  case BlendOp::e_MINUS_CLAMPED_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_MINUS_CLAMPED_EXT";
2880  case BlendOp::e_CONTRAST_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_CONTRAST_EXT";
2881  case BlendOp::e_INVERT_OVG_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_INVERT_OVG_EXT";
2882  case BlendOp::e_RED_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_RED_EXT";
2883  case BlendOp::e_GREEN_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_GREEN_EXT";
2884  case BlendOp::e_BLUE_EXT: return "VK_BLEND_OP_BLUE_EXT";
2885  default: return "invalid";
2886  }
2887 }

2889 enum class StencilOp
2890 {
2891  e_KEEP = VK_STENCIL_OP_KEEP,
2892  e_ZERO = VK_STENCIL_OP_ZERO,
2893  e_REPLACE = VK_STENCIL_OP_REPLACE,
2894  e_INCREMENT_AND_CLAMP = VK_STENCIL_OP_INCREMENT_AND_CLAMP,
2895  e_DECREMENT_AND_CLAMP = VK_STENCIL_OP_DECREMENT_AND_CLAMP,
2896  e_INVERT = VK_STENCIL_OP_INVERT,
2897  e_INCREMENT_AND_WRAP = VK_STENCIL_OP_INCREMENT_AND_WRAP,
2898  e_DECREMENT_AND_WRAP = VK_STENCIL_OP_DECREMENT_AND_WRAP,
2899  e_BEGIN_RANGE = VK_STENCIL_OP_BEGIN_RANGE,
2900  e_END_RANGE = VK_STENCIL_OP_END_RANGE,
2901  e_RANGE_SIZE = VK_STENCIL_OP_RANGE_SIZE,
2902  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
2903 };
2904 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(StencilOp)
2905 inline std::string to_string(StencilOp value)
2906 {
2907  switch(value)
2908  {
2909  case StencilOp::e_KEEP: return "VK_STENCIL_OP_KEEP";
2910  case StencilOp::e_ZERO: return "VK_STENCIL_OP_ZERO";
2911  case StencilOp::e_REPLACE: return "VK_STENCIL_OP_REPLACE";
2912  case StencilOp::e_INCREMENT_AND_CLAMP: return "VK_STENCIL_OP_INCREMENT_AND_CLAMP";
2913  case StencilOp::e_DECREMENT_AND_CLAMP: return "VK_STENCIL_OP_DECREMENT_AND_CLAMP";
2914  case StencilOp::e_INVERT: return "VK_STENCIL_OP_INVERT";
2915  case StencilOp::e_INCREMENT_AND_WRAP: return "VK_STENCIL_OP_INCREMENT_AND_WRAP";
2916  case StencilOp::e_DECREMENT_AND_WRAP: return "VK_STENCIL_OP_DECREMENT_AND_WRAP";
2917  default: return "invalid";
2918  }
2919 }
2920 
2921 enum class LogicOp
2922 {
2923  e_CLEAR = VK_LOGIC_OP_CLEAR,
2924  e_AND = VK_LOGIC_OP_AND,
2925  e_AND_REVERSE = VK_LOGIC_OP_AND_REVERSE,
2926  e_COPY = VK_LOGIC_OP_COPY,
2927  e_AND_INVERTED = VK_LOGIC_OP_AND_INVERTED,
2928  e_NO_OP = VK_LOGIC_OP_NO_OP,
2929  e_XOR = VK_LOGIC_OP_XOR,
2930  e_OR = VK_LOGIC_OP_OR,
2931  e_NOR = VK_LOGIC_OP_NOR,
2932  e_EQUIVALENT = VK_LOGIC_OP_EQUIVALENT,
2933  e_INVERT = VK_LOGIC_OP_INVERT,
2934  e_OR_REVERSE = VK_LOGIC_OP_OR_REVERSE,
2935  e_COPY_INVERTED = VK_LOGIC_OP_COPY_INVERTED,
2936  e_OR_INVERTED = VK_LOGIC_OP_OR_INVERTED,
2937  e_NAND = VK_LOGIC_OP_NAND,
2938  e_SET = VK_LOGIC_OP_SET,
2939  e_BEGIN_RANGE = VK_LOGIC_OP_BEGIN_RANGE,
2940  e_END_RANGE = VK_LOGIC_OP_END_RANGE,
2941  e_RANGE_SIZE = VK_LOGIC_OP_RANGE_SIZE,
2942  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
2943 };
2944 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(LogicOp)
2945 inline std::string to_string(LogicOp value)
2946 {
2947  switch(value)
2948  {
2949  case LogicOp::e_CLEAR: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_CLEAR";
2950  case LogicOp::e_AND: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_AND";
2951  case LogicOp::e_AND_REVERSE: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_AND_REVERSE";
2952  case LogicOp::e_COPY: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_COPY";
2953  case LogicOp::e_AND_INVERTED: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_AND_INVERTED";
2954  case LogicOp::e_NO_OP: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_NO_OP";
2955  case LogicOp::e_XOR: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_XOR";
2956  case LogicOp::e_OR: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_OR";
2957  case LogicOp::e_NOR: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_NOR";
2958  case LogicOp::e_EQUIVALENT: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_EQUIVALENT";
2959  case LogicOp::e_INVERT: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_INVERT";
2960  case LogicOp::e_OR_REVERSE: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_OR_REVERSE";
2961  case LogicOp::e_COPY_INVERTED: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_COPY_INVERTED";
2962  case LogicOp::e_OR_INVERTED: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_OR_INVERTED";
2963  case LogicOp::e_NAND: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_NAND";
2964  case LogicOp::e_SET: return "VK_LOGIC_OP_SET";
2965  default: return "invalid";
2966  }
2967 }
2968

3000 inline std::string to_string(SystemAllocationScope value)

3341 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(Format)
3342 inline std::string to_string(Format value)
3343 {
3344  switch(value)
3345  {
3346  case Format::e_UNDEFINED: return "VK_FORMAT_UNDEFINED";
3347  case Format::e_R4G4_UNORM_PACK8: return "VK_FORMAT_R4G4_UNORM_PACK8";
3348  case Format::e_R4G4B4A4_UNORM_PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_R4G4B4A4_UNORM_PACK16";
3349  case Format::e_B4G4R4A4_UNORM_PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_B4G4R4A4_UNORM_PACK16";
3350  case Format::e_R5G6B5_UNORM_PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_R5G6B5_UNORM_PACK16";
3351  case Format::e_B5G6R5_UNORM_PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_B5G6R5_UNORM_PACK16";
3352  case Format::e_R5G5B5A1_UNORM_PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_R5G5B5A1_UNORM_PACK16";
3353  case Format::e_B5G5R5A1_UNORM_PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_B5G5R5A1_UNORM_PACK16";
3354  case Format::e_A1R5G5B5_UNORM_PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_A1R5G5B5_UNORM_PACK16";
3355  case Format::e_R8_UNORM: return "VK_FORMAT_R8_UNORM";
3356  case Format::e_R8_SNORM: return "VK_FORMAT_R8_SNORM";
3357  case Format::e_R8_USCALED: return "VK_FORMAT_R8_USCALED";

3562  case Format::e_R10X6G10X6B10X6A10X6_UNORM_4PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_R10X6G10X6B10X6A10X6_UNORM_4PACK16";
3563  case Format::e_G10X6B10X6G10X6R10X6_422_UNORM_4PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G10X6B10X6G10X6R10X6_422_UNORM_4PACK16";
3564  case Format::e_B10X6G10X6R10X6G10X6_422_UNORM_4PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_B10X6G10X6R10X6G10X6_422_UNORM_4PACK16";
3565  case Format::e_G10X6_B10X6_R10X6_3PLANE_420_UNORM_3PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G10X6_B10X6_R10X6_3PLANE_420_UNORM_3PACK16";
3566  case Format::e_G10X6_B10X6R10X6_2PLANE_420_UNORM_3PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G10X6_B10X6R10X6_2PLANE_420_UNORM_3PACK16";
3567  case Format::e_G10X6_B10X6_R10X6_3PLANE_422_UNORM_3PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G10X6_B10X6_R10X6_3PLANE_422_UNORM_3PACK16";
3568  case Format::e_G10X6_B10X6R10X6_2PLANE_422_UNORM_3PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G10X6_B10X6R10X6_2PLANE_422_UNORM_3PACK16";
3569  case Format::e_G10X6_B10X6_R10X6_3PLANE_444_UNORM_3PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G10X6_B10X6_R10X6_3PLANE_444_UNORM_3PACK16";
3570  case Format::e_R12X4_UNORM_PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_R12X4_UNORM_PACK16";
3571  case Format::e_R12X4G12X4_UNORM_2PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_R12X4G12X4_UNORM_2PACK16";
3572  case Format::e_R12X4G12X4B12X4A12X4_UNORM_4PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_R12X4G12X4B12X4A12X4_UNORM_4PACK16";
3573  case Format::e_G12X4B12X4G12X4R12X4_422_UNORM_4PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G12X4B12X4G12X4R12X4_422_UNORM_4PACK16";
3574  case Format::e_B12X4G12X4R12X4G12X4_422_UNORM_4PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_B12X4G12X4R12X4G12X4_422_UNORM_4PACK16";
3575  case Format::e_G12X4_B12X4_R12X4_3PLANE_420_UNORM_3PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G12X4_B12X4_R12X4_3PLANE_420_UNORM_3PACK16";
3576  case Format::e_G12X4_B12X4R12X4_2PLANE_420_UNORM_3PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G12X4_B12X4R12X4_2PLANE_420_UNORM_3PACK16";
3577  case Format::e_G12X4_B12X4_R12X4_3PLANE_422_UNORM_3PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G12X4_B12X4_R12X4_3PLANE_422_UNORM_3PACK16";
3578  case Format::e_G12X4_B12X4R12X4_2PLANE_422_UNORM_3PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G12X4_B12X4R12X4_2PLANE_422_UNORM_3PACK16";
3579  case Format::e_G12X4_B12X4_R12X4_3PLANE_444_UNORM_3PACK16: return "VK_FORMAT_G12X4_B12X4_R12X4_3PLANE_444_UNORM_3PACK16";
3580  case Format::e_G16B16G16R16_422_UNORM: return "VK_FORMAT_G16B16G16R16_422_UNORM";
3581  case Format::e_B16G16R16G16_422_UNORM: return "VK_FORMAT_B16G16R16G16_422_UNORM";
3582  case Format::e_G16_B16_R16_3PLANE_420_UNORM: return "VK_FORMAT_G16_B16_R16_3PLANE_420_UNORM";
3583  case Format::e_G16_B16R16_2PLANE_420_UNORM: return "VK_FORMAT_G16_B16R16_2PLANE_420_UNORM";
3584  case Format::e_G16_B16_R16_3PLANE_422_UNORM: return "VK_FORMAT_G16_B16_R16_3PLANE_422_UNORM";
3585  case Format::e_G16_B16R16_2PLANE_422_UNORM: return "VK_FORMAT_G16_B16R16_2PLANE_422_UNORM";
3586  case Format::e_G16_B16_R16_3PLANE_444_UNORM: return "VK_FORMAT_G16_B16_R16_3PLANE_444_UNORM";
3587  default: return "invalid";
3588  }
3589 }

4111 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(StructureType)
4112 inline std::string to_string(StructureType value)
4113 {
4114  switch(value)
4115  {
4116  case StructureType::e_APPLICATION_INFO: return "VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_APPLICATION_INFO";
4117  case StructureType::e_INSTANCE_CREATE_INFO: return "VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_INSTANCE_CREATE_INFO";
4118  case StructureType::e_DEVICE_QUEUE_CREATE_INFO: return "VK_STRUCTURE_TYPE_DEVICE_QUEUE_CREATE_INFO";

4518 }
4519 
4520 enum class SubpassContents
4521 {
4522  e_INLINE = VK_SUBPASS_CONTENTS_INLINE,
4523  e_SECONDARY_COMMAND_BUFFERS = VK_SUBPASS_CONTENTS_SECONDARY_COMMAND_BUFFERS,
4524  e_BEGIN_RANGE = VK_SUBPASS_CONTENTS_BEGIN_RANGE,
4525  e_END_RANGE = VK_SUBPASS_CONTENTS_END_RANGE,
4526  e_RANGE_SIZE = VK_SUBPASS_CONTENTS_RANGE_SIZE,
4527  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
4528 };
4529 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(SubpassContents)
4530 inline std::string to_string(SubpassContents value)
4531 {
4532  switch(value)
4533  {
4534  case SubpassContents::e_INLINE: return "VK_SUBPASS_CONTENTS_INLINE";
4535  case SubpassContents::e_SECONDARY_COMMAND_BUFFERS: return "VK_SUBPASS_CONTENTS_SECONDARY_COMMAND_BUFFERS";
4536  default: return "invalid";
4537  }
4538 }
4539 
4540 enum class Result
4541 {
4542  e_SUCCESS = VK_SUCCESS,
4543  e_NOT_READY = VK_NOT_READY,
4544  e_TIMEOUT = VK_TIMEOUT,
4545  e_EVENT_SET = VK_EVENT_SET,
4546  e_EVENT_RESET = VK_EVENT_RESET,
4547  e_INCOMPLETE = VK_INCOMPLETE,
4548  e_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR = VK_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR,
4549  e_ERROR_OUT_OF_HOST_MEMORY = VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_HOST_MEMORY,
4550  e_ERROR_OUT_OF_DEVICE_MEMORY = VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_DEVICE_MEMORY,
4551  e_ERROR_INITIALIZATION_FAILED = VK_ERROR_INITIALIZATION_FAILED,
4552  e_ERROR_DEVICE_LOST = VK_ERROR_DEVICE_LOST,
4553  e_ERROR_MEMORY_MAP_FAILED = VK_ERROR_MEMORY_MAP_FAILED,
4554  e_ERROR_LAYER_NOT_PRESENT = VK_ERROR_LAYER_NOT_PRESENT,
4555  e_ERROR_EXTENSION_NOT_PRESENT = VK_ERROR_EXTENSION_NOT_PRESENT,
4556  e_ERROR_FEATURE_NOT_PRESENT = VK_ERROR_FEATURE_NOT_PRESENT,
4557  e_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DRIVER = VK_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DRIVER,
4558  e_ERROR_TOO_MANY_OBJECTS = VK_ERROR_TOO_MANY_OBJECTS,
4559  e_ERROR_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED = VK_ERROR_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED,
4560  e_ERROR_FRAGMENTED_POOL = VK_ERROR_FRAGMENTED_POOL,
4561  e_ERROR_UNKNOWN = VK_ERROR_UNKNOWN,
4562  e_ERROR_SURFACE_LOST_KHR = VK_ERROR_SURFACE_LOST_KHR,
4563  e_ERROR_NATIVE_WINDOW_IN_USE_KHR = VK_ERROR_NATIVE_WINDOW_IN_USE_KHR,
4564  e_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR = VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR,
4565  e_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DISPLAY_KHR = VK_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DISPLAY_KHR,
4566  e_ERROR_VALIDATION_FAILED_EXT = VK_ERROR_VALIDATION_FAILED_EXT,
4567  e_ERROR_INVALID_SHADER_NV = VK_ERROR_INVALID_SHADER_NV,
4568  e_ERROR_OUT_OF_POOL_MEMORY = VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_POOL_MEMORY,
4569  e_ERROR_INVALID_EXTERNAL_HANDLE = VK_ERROR_INVALID_EXTERNAL_HANDLE,
4570  e_ERROR_INVALID_DRM_FORMAT_MODIFIER_PLANE_LAYOUT_EXT = VK_ERROR_INVALID_DRM_FORMAT_MODIFIER_PLANE_LAYOUT_EXT,
4571  e_ERROR_FRAGMENTATION = VK_ERROR_FRAGMENTATION,
4572  e_ERROR_NOT_PERMITTED_EXT = VK_ERROR_NOT_PERMITTED_EXT,
4573  e_ERROR_FULL_SCREEN_EXCLUSIVE_MODE_LOST_EXT = VK_ERROR_FULL_SCREEN_EXCLUSIVE_MODE_LOST_EXT,
4574  e_ERROR_INVALID_OPAQUE_CAPTURE_ADDRESS = VK_ERROR_INVALID_OPAQUE_CAPTURE_ADDRESS,
4575  e_ERROR_OUT_OF_POOL_MEMORY_KHR = VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_POOL_MEMORY_KHR,
4576  e_ERROR_INVALID_EXTERNAL_HANDLE_KHR = VK_ERROR_INVALID_EXTERNAL_HANDLE_KHR,
4577  e_ERROR_FRAGMENTATION_EXT = VK_ERROR_FRAGMENTATION_EXT,
4578  e_ERROR_INVALID_DEVICE_ADDRESS_EXT = VK_ERROR_INVALID_DEVICE_ADDRESS_EXT,
4579  e_ERROR_INVALID_OPAQUE_CAPTURE_ADDRESS_KHR = VK_ERROR_INVALID_OPAQUE_CAPTURE_ADDRESS_KHR,
4580  e_BEGIN_RANGE = VK_RESULT_BEGIN_RANGE,
4581  e_END_RANGE = VK_RESULT_END_RANGE,
4582  e_RANGE_SIZE = VK_RESULT_RANGE_SIZE,
4583  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
4584 };
4585 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(Result)
4586 inline std::string to_string(Result value)
4587 {
4588  switch(value)
4589  {
4590  case Result::e_SUCCESS: return "VK_SUCCESS";
4591  case Result::e_NOT_READY: return "VK_NOT_READY";
4592  case Result::e_TIMEOUT: return "VK_TIMEOUT";
4593  case Result::e_EVENT_SET: return "VK_EVENT_SET";
4594  case Result::e_EVENT_RESET: return "VK_EVENT_RESET";
4595  case Result::e_INCOMPLETE: return "VK_INCOMPLETE";
4596  case Result::e_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR: return "VK_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR";
4597  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_HOST_MEMORY: return "VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_HOST_MEMORY";
4598  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_DEVICE_MEMORY: return "VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_DEVICE_MEMORY";
4599  case Result::e_ERROR_INITIALIZATION_FAILED: return "VK_ERROR_INITIALIZATION_FAILED";
4600  case Result::e_ERROR_DEVICE_LOST: return "VK_ERROR_DEVICE_LOST";
4601  case Result::e_ERROR_MEMORY_MAP_FAILED: return "VK_ERROR_MEMORY_MAP_FAILED";
4602  case Result::e_ERROR_LAYER_NOT_PRESENT: return "VK_ERROR_LAYER_NOT_PRESENT";
4603  case Result::e_ERROR_EXTENSION_NOT_PRESENT: return "VK_ERROR_EXTENSION_NOT_PRESENT";
4604  case Result::e_ERROR_FEATURE_NOT_PRESENT: return "VK_ERROR_FEATURE_NOT_PRESENT";
4605  case Result::e_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DRIVER: return "VK_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DRIVER";
4606  case Result::e_ERROR_TOO_MANY_OBJECTS: return "VK_ERROR_TOO_MANY_OBJECTS";
4607  case Result::e_ERROR_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED: return "VK_ERROR_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED";
4608  case Result::e_ERROR_FRAGMENTED_POOL: return "VK_ERROR_FRAGMENTED_POOL";
4609  case Result::e_ERROR_UNKNOWN: return "VK_ERROR_UNKNOWN";
4610  case Result::e_ERROR_SURFACE_LOST_KHR: return "VK_ERROR_SURFACE_LOST_KHR";
4611  case Result::e_ERROR_NATIVE_WINDOW_IN_USE_KHR: return "VK_ERROR_NATIVE_WINDOW_IN_USE_KHR";
4612  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR: return "VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR";
4613  case Result::e_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DISPLAY_KHR: return "VK_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DISPLAY_KHR";
4614  case Result::e_ERROR_VALIDATION_FAILED_EXT: return "VK_ERROR_VALIDATION_FAILED_EXT";
4615  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_SHADER_NV: return "VK_ERROR_INVALID_SHADER_NV";
4616  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_POOL_MEMORY: return "VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_POOL_MEMORY";
4617  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_EXTERNAL_HANDLE: return "VK_ERROR_INVALID_EXTERNAL_HANDLE";
4618  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_DRM_FORMAT_MODIFIER_PLANE_LAYOUT_EXT: return "VK_ERROR_INVALID_DRM_FORMAT_MODIFIER_PLANE_LAYOUT_EXT";
4619  case Result::e_ERROR_FRAGMENTATION: return "VK_ERROR_FRAGMENTATION";
4620  case Result::e_ERROR_NOT_PERMITTED_EXT: return "VK_ERROR_NOT_PERMITTED_EXT";
4621  case Result::e_ERROR_FULL_SCREEN_EXCLUSIVE_MODE_LOST_EXT: return "VK_ERROR_FULL_SCREEN_EXCLUSIVE_MODE_LOST_EXT";
4622  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_OPAQUE_CAPTURE_ADDRESS: return "VK_ERROR_INVALID_OPAQUE_CAPTURE_ADDRESS";
4623  default: return "invalid";
4624  }
4625 }

4628 {

4630  e_SCISSOR = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_SCISSOR,
4631  e_LINE_WIDTH = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_LINE_WIDTH,
4632  e_DEPTH_BIAS = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_DEPTH_BIAS,
4633  e_BLEND_CONSTANTS = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_BLEND_CONSTANTS,
4634  e_DEPTH_BOUNDS = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_DEPTH_BOUNDS,
4635  e_STENCIL_COMPARE_MASK = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_STENCIL_COMPARE_MASK,
4636  e_STENCIL_WRITE_MASK = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_STENCIL_WRITE_MASK,
4637  e_STENCIL_REFERENCE = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_STENCIL_REFERENCE,
4638  e_VIEWPORT_W_SCALING_NV = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_VIEWPORT_W_SCALING_NV,

4640  e_SAMPLE_LOCATIONS_EXT = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_SAMPLE_LOCATIONS_EXT,
4641  e_VIEWPORT_SHADING_RATE_PALETTE_NV = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_VIEWPORT_SHADING_RATE_PALETTE_NV,

4644  e_LINE_STIPPLE_EXT = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_LINE_STIPPLE_EXT,
4645  e_BEGIN_RANGE = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_BEGIN_RANGE,
4646  e_END_RANGE = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_END_RANGE,
4647  e_RANGE_SIZE = VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_RANGE_SIZE,
4648  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
4649 };
4650 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(DynamicState)
4651 inline std::string to_string(DynamicState value)
4652 {
4653  switch(value)
4654  {
4655  case DynamicState::e_VIEWPORT: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_VIEWPORT";
4656  case DynamicState::e_SCISSOR: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_SCISSOR";
4657  case DynamicState::e_LINE_WIDTH: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_LINE_WIDTH";
4658  case DynamicState::e_DEPTH_BIAS: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_DEPTH_BIAS";
4659  case DynamicState::e_BLEND_CONSTANTS: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_BLEND_CONSTANTS";
4660  case DynamicState::e_DEPTH_BOUNDS: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_DEPTH_BOUNDS";
4661  case DynamicState::e_STENCIL_COMPARE_MASK: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_STENCIL_COMPARE_MASK";
4662  case DynamicState::e_STENCIL_WRITE_MASK: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_STENCIL_WRITE_MASK";
4663  case DynamicState::e_STENCIL_REFERENCE: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_STENCIL_REFERENCE";
4664  case DynamicState::e_VIEWPORT_W_SCALING_NV: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_VIEWPORT_W_SCALING_NV";
4665  case DynamicState::e_DISCARD_RECTANGLE_EXT: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_DISCARD_RECTANGLE_EXT";
4666  case DynamicState::e_SAMPLE_LOCATIONS_EXT: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_SAMPLE_LOCATIONS_EXT";
4667  case DynamicState::e_VIEWPORT_SHADING_RATE_PALETTE_NV: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_VIEWPORT_SHADING_RATE_PALETTE_NV";
4668  case DynamicState::e_VIEWPORT_COARSE_SAMPLE_ORDER_NV: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_VIEWPORT_COARSE_SAMPLE_ORDER_NV";
4669  case DynamicState::e_EXCLUSIVE_SCISSOR_NV: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_EXCLUSIVE_SCISSOR_NV";
4670  case DynamicState::e_LINE_STIPPLE_EXT: return "VK_DYNAMIC_STATE_LINE_STIPPLE_EXT";
4671  default: return "invalid";
4672  }
4673 }

4861  e_BEGIN_RANGE = VK_COLOR_SPACE_BEGIN_RANGE_KHR,
4862  e_END_RANGE = VK_COLOR_SPACE_END_RANGE_KHR,
4863  e_RANGE_SIZE = VK_COLOR_SPACE_RANGE_SIZE_KHR,
4864  e_MAX_ENUM = 0x7FFFFFFF
4865 };
4866 DEFINE_ENUM_BITWISE_OPERATORS(ColorSpaceKHR)
4867 inline std::string to_string(ColorSpaceKHR value)
4868 {

5538  case QueueGlobalPriorityEXT::e_REALTIME_EXT: return "VK_QUEUE_GLOBAL_PRIORITY_REALTIME_EXT";
5539  default: return "invalid";
5540  }
5541 }
