6220 // PVRVk Format queries: isSrgb()
6221 inline bool isSrgb(Format value)
6222 {
6223  // This list is sorted by enum values
6224  const Format srgb_formats[] = {
6225  Format::e_R8_SRGB,
6226  Format::e_R8G8_SRGB,
6227  Format::e_R8G8B8_SRGB,
6228  Format::e_B8G8R8_SRGB,
6229  Format::e_R8G8B8A8_SRGB,
6230  Format::e_B8G8R8A8_SRGB,
6231  Format::e_A8B8G8R8_SRGB_PACK32,
6232  Format::e_BC1_RGB_SRGB_BLOCK,
6233  Format::e_BC1_RGBA_SRGB_BLOCK,
6234  Format::e_BC2_SRGB_BLOCK,
6235  Format::e_BC3_SRGB_BLOCK,
6236  Format::e_BC7_SRGB_BLOCK,
6237  Format::e_ETC2_R8G8B8_SRGB_BLOCK,
6238  Format::e_ETC2_R8G8B8A1_SRGB_BLOCK,
6239  Format::e_ETC2_R8G8B8A8_SRGB_BLOCK,
6240  Format::e_ASTC_4x4_SRGB_BLOCK,
6241  Format::e_ASTC_5x4_SRGB_BLOCK,
6242  Format::e_ASTC_5x5_SRGB_BLOCK,
6243  Format::e_ASTC_6x5_SRGB_BLOCK,
6244  Format::e_ASTC_6x6_SRGB_BLOCK,
6245  Format::e_ASTC_8x5_SRGB_BLOCK,
6246  Format::e_ASTC_8x6_SRGB_BLOCK,
6247  Format::e_ASTC_8x8_SRGB_BLOCK,
6248  Format::e_ASTC_10x5_SRGB_BLOCK,
6249  Format::e_ASTC_10x6_SRGB_BLOCK,
6250  Format::e_ASTC_10x8_SRGB_BLOCK,
6251  Format::e_ASTC_10x10_SRGB_BLOCK,
6252  Format::e_ASTC_12x10_SRGB_BLOCK,
6253  Format::e_ASTC_12x12_SRGB_BLOCK,
6254  Format::e_PVRTC1_2BPP_SRGB_BLOCK_IMG,
6255  Format::e_PVRTC1_4BPP_SRGB_BLOCK_IMG,
6256  Format::e_PVRTC2_2BPP_SRGB_BLOCK_IMG,
6257  Format::e_PVRTC2_4BPP_SRGB_BLOCK_IMG,
6258  };
6259  return std::binary_search(srgb_formats, srgb_formats + sizeof(srgb_formats)/sizeof(srgb_formats[0]), value);
6260 }
6261 
6262 // PVRVk Conversion : ObjectType to DebugReportObjectType
6263 inline DebugReportObjectTypeEXT convertObjectTypeToDebugReportObjectType(ObjectType objectType) { return static_cast<DebugReportObjectTypeEXT>(objectType); }
6264 
6265 // PVRVk Conversion : DebugReportObjectType to ObjectType
6266 inline ObjectType convertDebugReportObjectTypeToObjectType(DebugReportObjectTypeEXT debugReportObjectType) { return static_cast<ObjectType>(debugReportObjectType); }
6267 
6268 // PVRVk Structures
6269 struct Offset2D: private VkOffset2D
6270 {
6271  Offset2D()
6272  {
6273  setX(int32_t());
6274  setY(int32_t());
6275  }
6276  Offset2D(const VkOffset2D& vkType): VkOffset2D(vkType){}
6277  Offset2D(int32_t x, int32_t y)
6278  {
6279  setX(x);
6280  setY(y);
6281  }
6282  inline int32_t getX() const { return x; }
6283  inline void setX(int32_t inX) { this->x = inX; }
6284  inline int32_t getY() const { return y; }
6285  inline void setY(int32_t inY) { this->y = inY; }
6286  inline VkOffset2D& get() { return *this; }
6287  inline const VkOffset2D& get() const { return *this; }
6288 };
6289 
6290 struct Offset3D: private VkOffset3D

6296  setZ(int32_t());
6297  }

6299  Offset3D(int32_t x, int32_t y, int32_t z)
6300  {
6301  setX(x);
6302  setY(y);
6303  setZ(z);
6304  }
6305  inline int32_t getX() const { return x; }
6306  inline void setX(int32_t inX) { this->x = inX; }
6307  inline int32_t getY() const { return y; }
6308  inline void setY(int32_t inY) { this->y = inY; }
6309  inline int32_t getZ() const { return z; }
6310  inline void setZ(int32_t inZ) { this->z = inZ; }
6311  inline VkOffset3D& get() { return *this; }
6312  inline const VkOffset3D& get() const { return *this; }
6313 };

6361 struct Viewport: private VkViewport
6362 {
6363  Viewport()
6364  {
6365  setX(0.f);
6366  setY(0.f);
6367  setWidth(1.f);
6368  setHeight(1.f);
6369  setMinDepth(0.f);
6370  setMaxDepth(1.f);
6371  }
6372  Viewport(const VkViewport& vkType): VkViewport(vkType){}
6373  Viewport(float x, float y, float width, float height, float minDepth = 0.f, float maxDepth = 1.f)
6374  {
6375  setX(x);
6376  setY(y);
6377  setWidth(width);
6378  setHeight(height);
6379  setMinDepth(minDepth);
6380  setMaxDepth(maxDepth);
6381  }
6382  inline float getX() const { return x; }
6383  inline void setX(float inX) { this->x = inX; }
6384  inline float getY() const { return y; }
6385  inline void setY(float inY) { this->y = inY; }
6386  inline float getWidth() const { return width; }
6387  inline void setWidth(float inWidth) { this->width = inWidth; }
6388  inline float getHeight() const { return height; }
6389  inline void setHeight(float inHeight) { this->height = inHeight; }
6390  inline float getMinDepth() const { return minDepth; }
6391  inline void setMinDepth(float inMinDepth) { this->minDepth = inMinDepth; }
6392  inline float getMaxDepth() const { return maxDepth; }
6393  inline void setMaxDepth(float inMaxDepth) { this->maxDepth = inMaxDepth; }
6394  inline VkViewport& get() { return *this; }
6395  inline const VkViewport& get() const { return *this; }
6396 };
6397 
6398 struct Rect2D: private VkRect2D
6399 {
6400  Rect2D()
6401  {
6402  setOffset(Offset2D());
6403  setExtent(Extent2D());
6404  }
6405  Rect2D(const VkRect2D& vkType): VkRect2D(vkType){}
6406  Rect2D(const Offset2D& offset, const Extent2D& extent)
6407  {
6408  setOffset(offset);
6409  setExtent(extent);
6410  }
6411  Rect2D(int32_t x, int32_t y, uint32_t width, uint32_t height)
6412  {
6413  setOffset(pvrvk::Offset2D(x, y));
6414  setExtent(pvrvk::Extent2D(width, height));
6415  }
6416  inline const Offset2D& getOffset() const { return (Offset2D&)offset; }
6417  inline void setOffset(const Offset2D& inOffset) { memcpy(&this->offset, &inOffset, sizeof(this->offset)); }
6418  inline const Extent2D& getExtent() const { return (Extent2D&)extent; }
6419  inline void setExtent(const Extent2D& inExtent) { memcpy(&this->extent, &inExtent, sizeof(this->extent)); }
6420  inline VkRect2D& get() { return *this; }
6421  inline const VkRect2D& get() const { return *this; }
6422 };
6423 
6424 struct ClearRect: private VkClearRect
6425 {

6427  {
6428  setRect(Rect2D());
6429  setBaseArrayLayer(0);
6430  setLayerCount(1);
6431  }
6432  ClearRect(const VkClearRect& vkType): VkClearRect(vkType){}
6433  ClearRect(const Rect2D& rect, uint32_t baseArrayLayer = 0, uint32_t layerCount = 1)
6434  {
6435  setRect(rect);
6436  setBaseArrayLayer(baseArrayLayer);
6437  setLayerCount(layerCount);
6438  }
6439  inline const Rect2D& getRect() const { return (Rect2D&)rect; }
6440  inline void setRect(const Rect2D& inRect) { memcpy(&this->rect, &inRect, sizeof(this->rect)); }
6441  inline uint32_t getBaseArrayLayer() const { return baseArrayLayer; }
6442  inline void setBaseArrayLayer(uint32_t inBaseArrayLayer) { this->baseArrayLayer = inBaseArrayLayer; }
6443  inline uint32_t getLayerCount() const { return layerCount; }
6444  inline void setLayerCount(uint32_t inLayerCount) { this->layerCount = inLayerCount; }
6445  inline VkClearRect& get() { return *this; }
6446  inline const VkClearRect& get() const { return *this; }
6447 };

6455  setB(ComponentSwizzle());

6459  ComponentMapping(ComponentSwizzle r, ComponentSwizzle g, ComponentSwizzle b, ComponentSwizzle a)

6462  setG(g);
6463  setB(b);
6464  setA(a);
6465  }

6467  inline void setR(ComponentSwizzle inR) { this->r = (VkComponentSwizzle)inR; }
6468  inline ComponentSwizzle getG() const { return (ComponentSwizzle)g; }
6469  inline void setG(ComponentSwizzle inG) { this->g = (VkComponentSwizzle)inG; }
6470  inline ComponentSwizzle getB() const { return (ComponentSwizzle)b; }
6471  inline void setB(ComponentSwizzle inB) { this->b = (VkComponentSwizzle)inB; }
6472  inline ComponentSwizzle getA() const { return (ComponentSwizzle)a; }
6473  inline void setA(ComponentSwizzle inA) { this->a = (VkComponentSwizzle)inA; }
6474  inline VkComponentMapping& get() { return *this; }
6475  inline const VkComponentMapping& get() const { return *this; }
6476 };

6649 struct AllocationCallbacks: private VkAllocationCallbacks
6650 {
6651  AllocationCallbacks()
6652  {
6653  setPUserData(nullptr);
6654  setPfnAllocation(PFN_vkAllocationFunction());
6655  setPfnReallocation(PFN_vkReallocationFunction());
6656  setPfnFree(PFN_vkFreeFunction());
6657  setPfnInternalAllocation(PFN_vkInternalAllocationNotification());
6658  setPfnInternalFree(PFN_vkInternalFreeNotification());
6659  }
6660  AllocationCallbacks(const VkAllocationCallbacks& vkType): VkAllocationCallbacks(vkType){}
6661  AllocationCallbacks(void* pUserData, PFN_vkAllocationFunction pfnAllocation, PFN_vkReallocationFunction pfnReallocation, PFN_vkFreeFunction pfnFree, PFN_vkInternalAllocationNotification pfnInternalAllocation, PFN_vkInternalFreeNotification pfnInternalFree)
6662  {
6663  setPUserData(pUserData);
6664  setPfnAllocation(pfnAllocation);
6665  setPfnReallocation(pfnReallocation);
6666  setPfnFree(pfnFree);
6667  setPfnInternalAllocation(pfnInternalAllocation);
6668  setPfnInternalFree(pfnInternalFree);
6669  }
6670  inline const void* getPUserData() const { return pUserData; }
6671  inline void setPUserData(void* inPUserData) { this->pUserData = inPUserData; }
6672  inline PFN_vkAllocationFunction getPfnAllocation() const { return pfnAllocation; }
6673  inline void setPfnAllocation(PFN_vkAllocationFunction inPfnAllocation) { this->pfnAllocation = inPfnAllocation; }
6674  inline PFN_vkReallocationFunction getPfnReallocation() const { return pfnReallocation; }
6675  inline void setPfnReallocation(PFN_vkReallocationFunction inPfnReallocation) { this->pfnReallocation = inPfnReallocation; }
6676  inline PFN_vkFreeFunction getPfnFree() const { return pfnFree; }

6678  inline PFN_vkInternalAllocationNotification getPfnInternalAllocation() const { return pfnInternalAllocation; }

6680  inline PFN_vkInternalFreeNotification getPfnInternalFree() const { return pfnInternalFree; }
6681  inline void setPfnInternalFree(PFN_vkInternalFreeNotification inPfnInternalFree) { this->pfnInternalFree = inPfnInternalFree; }
6682  inline VkAllocationCallbacks& get() { return *this; }
6683  inline const VkAllocationCallbacks& get() const { return *this; }
6684 };

7041  {

7043  setMipLevel(mipLevel);
7044  setArrayLayer(arrayLayer);
7045  }

7047  inline void setAspectMask(ImageAspectFlags inAspectMask) { this->aspectMask = (VkImageAspectFlags)inAspectMask; }
7048  inline uint32_t getMipLevel() const { return mipLevel; }
7049  inline void setMipLevel(uint32_t inMipLevel) { this->mipLevel = inMipLevel; }
7050  inline uint32_t getArrayLayer() const { return arrayLayer; }
7051  inline void setArrayLayer(uint32_t inArrayLayer) { this->arrayLayer = inArrayLayer; }
7052  inline VkImageSubresource& get() { return *this; }
7053  inline const VkImageSubresource& get() const { return *this; }
7054 };

7083 };

7157 struct ImageCopy: private VkImageCopy
7158 {
7159  ImageCopy()
7160  {
7161  setSrcSubresource(ImageSubresourceLayers());
7162  setSrcOffset(Offset3D());
7163  setDstSubresource(ImageSubresourceLayers());
7164  setDstOffset(Offset3D());
7165  setExtent(Extent3D());
7166  }
7167  ImageCopy(const VkImageCopy& vkType): VkImageCopy(vkType){}
7168  ImageCopy(const ImageSubresourceLayers& srcSubresource, const Offset3D& srcOffset, const ImageSubresourceLayers& dstSubresource, const Offset3D& dstOffset, const Extent3D& extent)
7169  {
7170  setSrcSubresource(srcSubresource);
7171  setSrcOffset(srcOffset);
7172  setDstSubresource(dstSubresource);
7173  setDstOffset(dstOffset);
7174  setExtent(extent);
7175  }
7176  inline const ImageSubresourceLayers& getSrcSubresource() const { return (ImageSubresourceLayers&)srcSubresource; }
7177  inline void setSrcSubresource(const ImageSubresourceLayers& inSrcSubresource) { memcpy(&this->srcSubresource, &inSrcSubresource, sizeof(this->srcSubresource)); }
7178  inline const Offset3D& getSrcOffset() const { return (Offset3D&)srcOffset; }
7179  inline void setSrcOffset(const Offset3D& inSrcOffset) { memcpy(&this->srcOffset, &inSrcOffset, sizeof(this->srcOffset)); }
7180  inline const ImageSubresourceLayers& getDstSubresource() const { return (ImageSubresourceLayers&)dstSubresource; }
7181  inline void setDstSubresource(const ImageSubresourceLayers& inDstSubresource) { memcpy(&this->dstSubresource, &inDstSubresource, sizeof(this->dstSubresource)); }
7182  inline const Offset3D& getDstOffset() const { return (Offset3D&)dstOffset; }
7183  inline void setDstOffset(const Offset3D& inDstOffset) { memcpy(&this->dstOffset, &inDstOffset, sizeof(this->dstOffset)); }
7184  inline const Extent3D& getExtent() const { return (Extent3D&)extent; }
7185  inline void setExtent(const Extent3D& inExtent) { memcpy(&this->extent, &inExtent, sizeof(this->extent)); }
7186  inline VkImageCopy& get() { return *this; }
7187  inline const VkImageCopy& get() const { return *this; }
7188 };

7190 struct ImageBlit: private VkImageBlit
7191 {
7192  ImageBlit()
7193  {
7194  setSrcSubresource(ImageSubresourceLayers());
7195  memset(srcOffsets, 0, sizeof(srcOffsets));
7196  setDstSubresource(ImageSubresourceLayers());
7197  memset(dstOffsets, 0, sizeof(dstOffsets));
7198  }
7199  ImageBlit(const VkImageBlit& vkType): VkImageBlit(vkType){}
7200  ImageBlit(const ImageSubresourceLayers& srcSubresource, const Offset3D* srcOffsets, const ImageSubresourceLayers& dstSubresource, const Offset3D* dstOffsets)
7201  {
7202  setSrcSubresource(srcSubresource);
7203  setSrcOffsets(srcOffsets);
7204  setDstSubresource(dstSubresource);
7205  setDstOffsets(dstOffsets);
7206  }
7207  inline const ImageSubresourceLayers& getSrcSubresource() const { return (ImageSubresourceLayers&)srcSubresource; }
7208  inline void setSrcSubresource(const ImageSubresourceLayers& inSrcSubresource) { memcpy(&this->srcSubresource, &inSrcSubresource, sizeof(this->srcSubresource)); }
7209  inline const Offset3D* getSrcOffsets() const { return (Offset3D*)srcOffsets; }
7210  inline void setSrcOffsets(const Offset3D* inSrcOffsets) { memcpy(this->srcOffsets, inSrcOffsets, sizeof(this->srcOffsets)); }
7211  inline const ImageSubresourceLayers& getDstSubresource() const { return (ImageSubresourceLayers&)dstSubresource; }
7212  inline void setDstSubresource(const ImageSubresourceLayers& inDstSubresource) { memcpy(&this->dstSubresource, &inDstSubresource, sizeof(this->dstSubresource)); }
7213  inline const Offset3D* getDstOffsets() const { return (Offset3D*)dstOffsets; }
7214  inline void setDstOffsets(const Offset3D* inDstOffsets) { memcpy(this->dstOffsets, inDstOffsets, sizeof(this->dstOffsets)); }
7215  inline VkImageBlit& get() { return *this; }
7216  inline const VkImageBlit& get() const { return *this; }
7217 };

7389  inline size_t getDataSize() const { return dataSize; }

7451 struct PipelineColorBlendAttachmentState: private VkPipelineColorBlendAttachmentState
7452 {
7453  PipelineColorBlendAttachmentState()
7454  {
7455  setBlendEnable(false);
7456  setSrcColorBlendFactor(BlendFactor::e_ONE);
7457  setDstColorBlendFactor(BlendFactor::e_ZERO);
7458  setColorBlendOp(BlendOp::e_ADD);
7459  setSrcAlphaBlendFactor(BlendFactor::e_ONE);
7460  setDstAlphaBlendFactor(BlendFactor::e_ZERO);
7461  setAlphaBlendOp(BlendOp::e_ADD);
7462  setColorWriteMask(ColorComponentFlags::e_ALL_BITS);
7463  }
7464  PipelineColorBlendAttachmentState(const VkPipelineColorBlendAttachmentState& vkType): VkPipelineColorBlendAttachmentState(vkType){}
7465  PipelineColorBlendAttachmentState(VkBool32 blendEnable, BlendFactor srcColorBlendFactor = BlendFactor::e_ONE, BlendFactor dstColorBlendFactor = BlendFactor::e_ZERO, BlendOp colorBlendOp = BlendOp::e_ADD, BlendFactor srcAlphaBlendFactor = BlendFactor::e_ONE, BlendFactor dstAlphaBlendFactor = BlendFactor::e_ZERO, BlendOp alphaBlendOp = BlendOp::e_ADD, ColorComponentFlags colorWriteMask = ColorComponentFlags::e_ALL_BITS)
7466  {
7467  setBlendEnable(blendEnable);
7468  setSrcColorBlendFactor(srcColorBlendFactor);
7469  setDstColorBlendFactor(dstColorBlendFactor);
7470  setColorBlendOp(colorBlendOp);
7471  setSrcAlphaBlendFactor(srcAlphaBlendFactor);
7472  setDstAlphaBlendFactor(dstAlphaBlendFactor);
7473  setAlphaBlendOp(alphaBlendOp);
7474  setColorWriteMask(colorWriteMask);
7475  }
7476  inline VkBool32 getBlendEnable() const { return blendEnable; }
7477  inline void setBlendEnable(VkBool32 inBlendEnable) { this->blendEnable = inBlendEnable; }

7480  inline BlendFactor getDstColorBlendFactor() const { return (BlendFactor)dstColorBlendFactor; }

7482  inline BlendOp getColorBlendOp() const { return (BlendOp)colorBlendOp; }
7483  inline void setColorBlendOp(BlendOp inColorBlendOp) { this->colorBlendOp = (VkBlendOp)inColorBlendOp; }
7484  inline BlendFactor getSrcAlphaBlendFactor() const { return (BlendFactor)srcAlphaBlendFactor; }

7488  inline BlendOp getAlphaBlendOp() const { return (BlendOp)alphaBlendOp; }

7490  inline ColorComponentFlags getColorWriteMask() const { return (ColorComponentFlags)colorWriteMask; }
7491  inline void setColorWriteMask(ColorComponentFlags inColorWriteMask) { this->colorWriteMask = (VkColorComponentFlags)inColorWriteMask; }
7492  inline VkPipelineColorBlendAttachmentState& get() { return *this; }
7493  inline const VkPipelineColorBlendAttachmentState& get() const { return *this; }

7496 struct StencilOpState: private VkStencilOpState
7497 {
7498  StencilOpState()
7499  {
7500  setFailOp(StencilOp::e_KEEP);
7501  setPassOp(StencilOp::e_KEEP);
7502  setDepthFailOp(StencilOp::e_KEEP);
7503  setCompareOp(CompareOp::e_ALWAYS);
7504  setCompareMask(0xff);
7505  setWriteMask(0xff);
7506  setReference(0);
7507  }
7508  StencilOpState(const VkStencilOpState& vkType): VkStencilOpState(vkType){}
7509  StencilOpState(StencilOp failOp, StencilOp passOp, StencilOp depthFailOp, CompareOp compareOp, uint32_t compareMask, uint32_t writeMask, uint32_t reference)
7510  {
7511  setFailOp(failOp);
7512  setPassOp(passOp);
7513  setDepthFailOp(depthFailOp);
7514  setCompareOp(compareOp);
7515  setCompareMask(compareMask);
7516  setWriteMask(writeMask);
7517  setReference(reference);
7518  }
7519  inline StencilOp getFailOp() const { return (StencilOp)failOp; }
7520  inline void setFailOp(StencilOp inFailOp) { this->failOp = (VkStencilOp)inFailOp; }
7521  inline StencilOp getPassOp() const { return (StencilOp)passOp; }
7522  inline void setPassOp(StencilOp inPassOp) { this->passOp = (VkStencilOp)inPassOp; }
7523  inline StencilOp getDepthFailOp() const { return (StencilOp)depthFailOp; }
7524  inline void setDepthFailOp(StencilOp inDepthFailOp) { this->depthFailOp = (VkStencilOp)inDepthFailOp; }
7525  inline CompareOp getCompareOp() const { return (CompareOp)compareOp; }
7526  inline void setCompareOp(CompareOp inCompareOp) { this->compareOp = (VkCompareOp)inCompareOp; }
7527  inline uint32_t getCompareMask() const { return compareMask; }
7528  inline void setCompareMask(uint32_t inCompareMask) { this->compareMask = inCompareMask; }
7529  inline uint32_t getWriteMask() const { return writeMask; }
7530  inline void setWriteMask(uint32_t inWriteMask) { this->writeMask = inWriteMask; }
7531  inline uint32_t getReference() const { return reference; }
7532  inline void setReference(uint32_t inReference) { this->reference = inReference; }
7533  inline VkStencilOpState& get() { return *this; }
7534  inline const VkStencilOpState& get() const { return *this; }
7535 };

7613  setDstAccessMask(AccessFlags());
7614  setDependencyFlags(DependencyFlags());

7620  setDstSubpass(dstSubpass);

7622  setDstStageMask(dstStageMask);
7623  setSrcAccessMask(srcAccessMask);
7624  setDstAccessMask(dstAccessMask);
7625  setDependencyFlags(dependencyFlags);
7626  }

7637  inline AccessFlags getDstAccessMask() const { return (AccessFlags)dstAccessMask; }

8278  {

8281  setZ(ViewportCoordinateSwizzleNV());
8282  setW(ViewportCoordinateSwizzleNV());
8283  }
8284  ViewportSwizzleNV(const VkViewportSwizzleNV& vkType): VkViewportSwizzleNV(vkType){}

8286  {
8287  setX(x);
8288  setY(y);
8289  setZ(z);
8290  setW(w);
8291  }

8299  inline void setW(ViewportCoordinateSwizzleNV inW) { this->w = (VkViewportCoordinateSwizzleNV)inW; }

8695 
8696 
8697 // PVRVk Errors
8698 
8699 namespace impl {
8700 
8707  inline static bool isDebuggerPresent()
8708  {
8709  // only check once for whether the debugger is present as this may not be efficient to determine
8710  static bool isUsingDebugger = false;
8711  static bool haveCheckedForDebugger = false;
8712  if (!haveCheckedForDebugger)
8713  {
8714 #if defined(_MSC_VER)
8715  if (IsDebuggerPresent())
8716  {
8717  isUsingDebugger = true;
8718  }
8719 #elif defined(__linux__)
8720  // reference implementation taken from: https://stackoverflow.com/a/24969863
8721  char buf[1024];
8722 
8723  int status_fd = open("/proc/self/status", O_RDONLY);
8724  if (status_fd == -1)
8725  {
8726  isUsingDebugger = false;
8727  }
8728  else
8729  {
8730  ssize_t num_read = read(status_fd, buf, sizeof(buf) - 1);
8731  if (num_read > 0)
8732  {
8733  static const char TracerPid[] = "TracerPid:";
8734  char* tracer_pid;
8735 
8736  buf[num_read] = 0;
8737  tracer_pid = strstr(buf, TracerPid);
8738  if (tracer_pid)
8739  {
8740  isUsingDebugger = !!atoi(tracer_pid + sizeof(TracerPid) - 1);
8741  }
8742  }
8743  }
8744 #endif
8745  haveCheckedForDebugger = true;
8746  }
8747 
8748  return isUsingDebugger;
8749  }
8750 
8752  inline void debuggerBreak()
8753  {
8754  if (isDebuggerPresent())
8755  {
8756 #if defined(__linux__)
8757  {
8758  raise(SIGTRAP);
8759  }
8760 #elif defined(_MSC_VER)
8761  __debugbreak();
8762 #endif
8763  }
8764  }
8765 }
8769 inline char const* vkErrorToStr(Result errorCode)
8770 {
8771  switch (errorCode)
8772  {
8773  case Result::e_SUCCESS: return "VK_SUCCESS";
8774  case Result::e_NOT_READY: return "VK_NOT_READY";
8775  case Result::e_TIMEOUT: return "VK_TIMEOUT";
8776  case Result::e_EVENT_SET: return "VK_EVENT_SET";
8777  case Result::e_EVENT_RESET: return "VK_EVENT_RESET";
8778  case Result::e_INCOMPLETE: return "VK_INCOMPLETE";
8779  case Result::e_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR: return "VK_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR";
8780  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_HOST_MEMORY: return "VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_HOST_MEMORY";
8781  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_DEVICE_MEMORY: return "VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_DEVICE_MEMORY";
8782  case Result::e_ERROR_INITIALIZATION_FAILED: return "VK_ERROR_INITIALIZATION_FAILED";
8783  case Result::e_ERROR_DEVICE_LOST: return "VK_ERROR_DEVICE_LOST";
8784  case Result::e_ERROR_MEMORY_MAP_FAILED: return "VK_ERROR_MEMORY_MAP_FAILED";
8785  case Result::e_ERROR_LAYER_NOT_PRESENT: return "VK_ERROR_LAYER_NOT_PRESENT";
8786  case Result::e_ERROR_EXTENSION_NOT_PRESENT: return "VK_ERROR_EXTENSION_NOT_PRESENT";
8787  case Result::e_ERROR_FEATURE_NOT_PRESENT: return "VK_ERROR_FEATURE_NOT_PRESENT";
8788  case Result::e_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DRIVER: return "VK_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DRIVER";
8789  case Result::e_ERROR_TOO_MANY_OBJECTS: return "VK_ERROR_TOO_MANY_OBJECTS";
8790  case Result::e_ERROR_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED: return "VK_ERROR_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED";
8791  case Result::e_ERROR_FRAGMENTED_POOL: return "VK_ERROR_FRAGMENTED_POOL";
8792  case Result::e_ERROR_UNKNOWN: return "VK_ERROR_UNKNOWN";
8793  case Result::e_ERROR_SURFACE_LOST_KHR: return "VK_ERROR_SURFACE_LOST_KHR";
8794  case Result::e_ERROR_NATIVE_WINDOW_IN_USE_KHR: return "VK_ERROR_NATIVE_WINDOW_IN_USE_KHR";
8795  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR: return "VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR";
8796  case Result::e_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DISPLAY_KHR: return "VK_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DISPLAY_KHR";
8797  case Result::e_ERROR_VALIDATION_FAILED_EXT: return "VK_ERROR_VALIDATION_FAILED_EXT";
8798  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_SHADER_NV: return "VK_ERROR_INVALID_SHADER_NV";
8799  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_POOL_MEMORY: return "VK_ERROR_OUT_OF_POOL_MEMORY";
8800  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_EXTERNAL_HANDLE: return "VK_ERROR_INVALID_EXTERNAL_HANDLE";
8801  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_DRM_FORMAT_MODIFIER_PLANE_LAYOUT_EXT: return "VK_ERROR_INVALID_DRM_FORMAT_MODIFIER_PLANE_LAYOUT_EXT";
8802  case Result::e_ERROR_FRAGMENTATION: return "VK_ERROR_FRAGMENTATION";
8803  case Result::e_ERROR_NOT_PERMITTED_EXT: return "VK_ERROR_NOT_PERMITTED_EXT";
8804  case Result::e_ERROR_FULL_SCREEN_EXCLUSIVE_MODE_LOST_EXT: return "VK_ERROR_FULL_SCREEN_EXCLUSIVE_MODE_LOST_EXT";
8805  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_OPAQUE_CAPTURE_ADDRESS: return "VK_ERROR_INVALID_OPAQUE_CAPTURE_ADDRESS";
8806  default: return ("-- Result::UNKNOWN ERROR CODE--");
8807  break;
8808  }
8809 }
8810 
8811 class Error: public std::runtime_error
8812 {
8813 protected:
8814  Result _result;
8815 public:
8816  virtual ~Error() {}
8817  Error(Result result, const std::string& errorMessage) :
8818  runtime_error(std::string("[") + vkErrorToStr(result) + ("] : ") + errorMessage), _result(result)
8819  {
8820 #ifdef DEBUG
8821  impl::debuggerBreak();
8822 #endif
8823  }
8824  Error(Result result, const char* errorMessage = nullptr) :
8825  runtime_error((std::string("[") + vkErrorToStr(result) + "] : ") + (errorMessage ? errorMessage : "")), _result(result)
8826  {
8827 #ifdef DEBUG
8828  impl::debuggerBreak();
8829 #endif
8830  }
8831  const char* getErrorMessage() const { return what(); }
8832  Result getResult() const { return _result; }
8833  const char* getResultCode() const { return vkErrorToStr(_result); }
8834 };
8835 
8836 class Success: public Error
8837 {
8838 public:
8839  virtual ~Success(){}
8840  Success(const char* errorMessage = nullptr): Error(Result::e_SUCCESS, errorMessage) {}
8841  explicit Success(const std::string& errorMessage): Error(Result::e_SUCCESS, errorMessage) {}
8842 };

9067 
9068 namespace impl {
9072 inline void vkThrowIfFailed(Result result, const char* message = 0)
9073 {
9074  switch (result)
9075  {
9076  case Result::e_NOT_READY: throw NotReady(message);
9077  case Result::e_TIMEOUT: throw Timeout(message);
9078  case Result::e_EVENT_SET: throw EventSet(message);
9079  case Result::e_EVENT_RESET: throw EventReset(message);
9080  case Result::e_INCOMPLETE: throw Incomplete(message);
9081  case Result::e_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR: throw SuboptimalKHR(message);
9082  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_HOST_MEMORY: throw ErrorOutOfHostMemory(message);
9083  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_DEVICE_MEMORY: throw ErrorOutOfDeviceMemory(message);
9084  case Result::e_ERROR_INITIALIZATION_FAILED: throw ErrorInitializationFailed(message);
9085  case Result::e_ERROR_DEVICE_LOST: throw ErrorDeviceLost(message);
9086  case Result::e_ERROR_MEMORY_MAP_FAILED: throw ErrorMemoryMapFailed(message);
9087  case Result::e_ERROR_LAYER_NOT_PRESENT: throw ErrorLayerNotPresent(message);
9088  case Result::e_ERROR_EXTENSION_NOT_PRESENT: throw ErrorExtensionNotPresent(message);
9089  case Result::e_ERROR_FEATURE_NOT_PRESENT: throw ErrorFeatureNotPresent(message);
9090  case Result::e_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DRIVER: throw ErrorIncompatibleDriver(message);
9091  case Result::e_ERROR_TOO_MANY_OBJECTS: throw ErrorTooManyObjects(message);
9092  case Result::e_ERROR_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED: throw ErrorFormatNotSupported(message);
9093  case Result::e_ERROR_FRAGMENTED_POOL: throw ErrorFragmentedPool(message);
9094  case Result::e_ERROR_UNKNOWN: throw ErrorUnknown(message);
9095  case Result::e_ERROR_SURFACE_LOST_KHR: throw ErrorSurfaceLostKHR(message);
9096  case Result::e_ERROR_NATIVE_WINDOW_IN_USE_KHR: throw ErrorNativeWindowInUseKHR(message);
9097  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR: throw ErrorOutOfDateKHR(message);
9098  case Result::e_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DISPLAY_KHR: throw ErrorIncompatibleDisplayKHR(message);
9099  case Result::e_ERROR_VALIDATION_FAILED_EXT: throw ErrorValidationFailedEXT(message);
9100  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_SHADER_NV: throw ErrorInvalidShaderNV(message);
9101  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_POOL_MEMORY: throw ErrorOutOfPoolMemory(message);
9102  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_EXTERNAL_HANDLE: throw ErrorInvalidExternalHandle(message);
9103  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_DRM_FORMAT_MODIFIER_PLANE_LAYOUT_EXT: throw ErrorInvalidDrmFormatModifierPlaneLayoutEXT(message);
9104  case Result::e_ERROR_FRAGMENTATION: throw ErrorFragmentation(message);
9105  case Result::e_ERROR_NOT_PERMITTED_EXT: throw ErrorNotPermittedEXT(message);
9106  case Result::e_ERROR_FULL_SCREEN_EXCLUSIVE_MODE_LOST_EXT: throw ErrorFullScreenExclusiveModeLostEXT(message);
9107  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_OPAQUE_CAPTURE_ADDRESS: throw ErrorInvalidOpaqueCaptureAddress(message);
9108  case Result::e_SUCCESS:
9109  break;
9110  default: throw ErrorUnknown(message);
9111  }
9112 }
9113 
9117 inline void vkThrowIfFailed(VkResult result, const char* message = 0)
9118 {
9119  vkThrowIfFailed(static_cast<pvrvk::Result>(result), message);
9120 }
9121 
9125 inline void vkThrowIfError(Result result, const char* message = 0)
9126 {
9127  switch (result)
9128  {
9129  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_HOST_MEMORY: throw ErrorOutOfHostMemory(message);
9130  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_DEVICE_MEMORY: throw ErrorOutOfDeviceMemory(message);
9131  case Result::e_ERROR_INITIALIZATION_FAILED: throw ErrorInitializationFailed(message);
9132  case Result::e_ERROR_DEVICE_LOST: throw ErrorDeviceLost(message);
9133  case Result::e_ERROR_MEMORY_MAP_FAILED: throw ErrorMemoryMapFailed(message);
9134  case Result::e_ERROR_LAYER_NOT_PRESENT: throw ErrorLayerNotPresent(message);
9135  case Result::e_ERROR_EXTENSION_NOT_PRESENT: throw ErrorExtensionNotPresent(message);
9136  case Result::e_ERROR_FEATURE_NOT_PRESENT: throw ErrorFeatureNotPresent(message);
9137  case Result::e_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DRIVER: throw ErrorIncompatibleDriver(message);
9138  case Result::e_ERROR_TOO_MANY_OBJECTS: throw ErrorTooManyObjects(message);
9139  case Result::e_ERROR_FORMAT_NOT_SUPPORTED: throw ErrorFormatNotSupported(message);
9140  case Result::e_ERROR_FRAGMENTED_POOL: throw ErrorFragmentedPool(message);
9141  case Result::e_ERROR_UNKNOWN: throw ErrorUnknown(message);
9142  case Result::e_ERROR_SURFACE_LOST_KHR: throw ErrorSurfaceLostKHR(message);
9143  case Result::e_ERROR_NATIVE_WINDOW_IN_USE_KHR: throw ErrorNativeWindowInUseKHR(message);
9144  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_DATE_KHR: throw ErrorOutOfDateKHR(message);
9145  case Result::e_ERROR_INCOMPATIBLE_DISPLAY_KHR: throw ErrorIncompatibleDisplayKHR(message);
9146  case Result::e_ERROR_VALIDATION_FAILED_EXT: throw ErrorValidationFailedEXT(message);
9147  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_SHADER_NV: throw ErrorInvalidShaderNV(message);
9148  case Result::e_ERROR_OUT_OF_POOL_MEMORY: throw ErrorOutOfPoolMemory(message);
9149  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_EXTERNAL_HANDLE: throw ErrorInvalidExternalHandle(message);
9150  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_DRM_FORMAT_MODIFIER_PLANE_LAYOUT_EXT: throw ErrorInvalidDrmFormatModifierPlaneLayoutEXT(message);
9151  case Result::e_ERROR_FRAGMENTATION: throw ErrorFragmentation(message);
9152  case Result::e_ERROR_NOT_PERMITTED_EXT: throw ErrorNotPermittedEXT(message);
9153  case Result::e_ERROR_FULL_SCREEN_EXCLUSIVE_MODE_LOST_EXT: throw ErrorFullScreenExclusiveModeLostEXT(message);
9154  case Result::e_ERROR_INVALID_OPAQUE_CAPTURE_ADDRESS: throw ErrorInvalidOpaqueCaptureAddress(message);
9155  case Result::e_SUCCESS:
9156  case Result::e_NOT_READY:
9157  case Result::e_TIMEOUT:
9158  case Result::e_EVENT_SET:
9159  case Result::e_EVENT_RESET:
9160  case Result::e_INCOMPLETE:
9161  case Result::e_SUBOPTIMAL_KHR:
9162  break;
9163  default: throw ErrorUnknown(message);
9164  }
9165 }
9166 }// namespace impl
9167 
9168 
9169 // Generated extension tables which can be used to determine support for enabled extensions
9171 struct InstanceExtensionTable
9172 {
9173 public:
9174  // VK_KHR_surface
9175  bool khrSurfaceEnabled = false;
9176  // VK_KHR_display
9177  bool khrDisplayEnabled = false;
9178  // VK_KHR_xlib_surface
9179  bool khrXlibSurfaceEnabled = false;
9180  // VK_KHR_xcb_surface
9181  bool khrXcbSurfaceEnabled = false;
9182  // VK_KHR_wayland_surface
9183  bool khrWaylandSurfaceEnabled = false;
9184  // VK_KHR_android_surface
9185  bool khrAndroidSurfaceEnabled = false;
9186  // VK_KHR_win32_surface
9187  bool khrWin32SurfaceEnabled = false;
9188  // VK_EXT_debug_report
9189  bool extDebugReportEnabled = false;
9190  // VK_GGP_stream_descriptor_surface
9191  bool ggpStreamDescriptorSurfaceEnabled = false;
9192  // VK_NV_external_memory_capabilities
9193  bool nvExternalMemoryCapabilitiesEnabled = false;

9236 
9237 void setEnabledExtension(const std::string& extension)
9238 {
9239  std::string instanceExtensions[31] = {
9240  "VK_KHR_surface",
9241  "VK_KHR_display",
9242  "VK_KHR_xlib_surface",
9243  "VK_KHR_xcb_surface",
9244  "VK_KHR_wayland_surface",
9245  "VK_KHR_android_surface",
9246  "VK_KHR_win32_surface",
9247  "VK_EXT_debug_report",
9248  "VK_GGP_stream_descriptor_surface",
9249  "VK_NV_external_memory_capabilities",
9250  "VK_KHR_get_physical_device_properties2",
9251  "VK_EXT_validation_flags",
9252  "VK_NN_vi_surface",
9253  "VK_KHR_device_group_creation",
9254  "VK_KHR_external_memory_capabilities",
9255  "VK_KHR_external_semaphore_capabilities",
9256  "VK_EXT_direct_mode_display",
9257  "VK_EXT_acquire_xlib_display",
9258  "VK_EXT_display_surface_counter",
9259  "VK_EXT_swapchain_colorspace",
9260  "VK_KHR_external_fence_capabilities",
9261  "VK_KHR_get_surface_capabilities2",
9262  "VK_KHR_get_display_properties2",
9263  "VK_MVK_ios_surface",
9264  "VK_MVK_macos_surface",
9265  "VK_EXT_debug_utils",
9266  "VK_FUCHSIA_imagepipe_surface",
9267  "VK_EXT_metal_surface",
9268  "VK_KHR_surface_protected_capabilities",
9269  "VK_EXT_validation_features",
9270  "VK_EXT_headless_surface",
9271  };
9272 
9273  bool* instanceExtensionsFlags[31] = {
9274  &khrSurfaceEnabled,
9275  &khrDisplayEnabled,
9276  &khrXlibSurfaceEnabled,
9277  &khrXcbSurfaceEnabled,
9278  &khrWaylandSurfaceEnabled,
9279  &khrAndroidSurfaceEnabled,
9280  &khrWin32SurfaceEnabled,
9281  &extDebugReportEnabled,
9282  &ggpStreamDescriptorSurfaceEnabled,
9283  &nvExternalMemoryCapabilitiesEnabled,
9284  &khrGetPhysicalDeviceProperties2Enabled,
9285  &extValidationFlagsEnabled,
9286  &nnViSurfaceEnabled,
9287  &khrDeviceGroupCreationEnabled,
9288  &khrExternalMemoryCapabilitiesEnabled,
9289  &khrExternalSemaphoreCapabilitiesEnabled,
9290  &extDirectModeDisplayEnabled,
9291  &extAcquireXlibDisplayEnabled,
9292  &extDisplaySurfaceCounterEnabled,
9293  &extSwapchainColorspaceEnabled,
9294  &khrExternalFenceCapabilitiesEnabled,
9295  &khrGetSurfaceCapabilities2Enabled,
9296  &khrGetDisplayProperties2Enabled,
9297  &mvkIosSurfaceEnabled,
9298  &mvkMacosSurfaceEnabled,
9299  &extDebugUtilsEnabled,
9300  &fuchsiaImagepipeSurfaceEnabled,
9301  &extMetalSurfaceEnabled,
9302  &khrSurfaceProtectedCapabilitiesEnabled,
9303  &extValidationFeaturesEnabled,
9304  &extHeadlessSurfaceEnabled,
9305  };
9306 
9307  for(uint32_t i = 0; i < 31; ++i)
9308  {
9309  if (extension == instanceExtensions[i])
9310  {
9311  *instanceExtensionsFlags[i] = true;
9312  }
9313  }
9314 }
9315 
9316 void setEnabledExtensions(const std::vector<std::string>& extensions)
9317 {
9318  for(uint32_t i = 0; i < static_cast<uint32_t>(extensions.size()); ++i)
9319  {
9320  setEnabledExtension(extensions[i]);
9321  }
9322 }
9323 
9324 void setEnabledExtensions(const std::vector<const char*>& extensions)
9325 {
9326  for(uint32_t i = 0; i < static_cast<uint32_t>(extensions.size()); ++i)
9327  {
9328  setEnabledExtension(extensions[i]);
9329  }
9330 }
9331 };
9332

10002 
10003 void setEnabledExtensions(const std::vector<std::string>& extensions)
10004 {
10005  for(uint32_t i = 0; i < static_cast<uint32_t>(extensions.size()); ++i)
10006  {
10007  setEnabledExtension(extensions[i]);
10008  }
10009 }
10010 
10011 void setEnabledExtensions(const std::vector<const char*>& extensions)
10012 {
10013  for(uint32_t i = 0; i < static_cast<uint32_t>(extensions.size()); ++i)
10014  {
10015  setEnabledExtension(extensions[i]);
10016  }
10017 }
